  expiration_date date [note: 'The date the license expires and is no longer valid unless renewed. Critical for credentialing compliance and provider directory accuracy. Null for licenses with no expiration.']
  issue_date date [note: 'The date the license or registration was originally issued by the licensing authority. Used to calculate license tenure and verify historical credentialing timelines.']
  issuing_authority varchar [note: 'The regulatory body or government agency that issued the license or registration. Examples include State Medical Board, State Board of Nursing, Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA), State Pharmacy Board, or Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS).']
  issuing_state varchar [note: 'The U.S. state or territory that issued the license. Uses two-letter state abbreviation. Critical for multi-state licensure tracking and Interstate Medical Licensure Compact compliance. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: AL|AK|AZ|AR|CA|CO|CT|DE|FL|GA|HI|ID|IL|IN|IA|KS|KY|LA|ME|MD|MA|MI|MN|MS|MO|MT|NE|NV|NH|NJ|NM|NY|NC|ND|OH|OK|OR|PA|RI|SC|SD|TN|TX|UT|VT|VA|WA|WV|WI|WY|DC — 51 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  license_number varchar [note: 'The unique license or registration number issued by the licensing authority. For DEA registrations, this is the DEA number; for state medical licenses, this is the state-issued license number.']
  license_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the license or registration in its lifecycle. Active indicates the license is valid and in good standing; suspended, revoked, or expired indicate the provider cannot practice under this credential. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: active|inactive|suspended|revoked|expired|surrendered|pending_renewal|probation|restricted — 9 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  license_type varchar [note: 'The category of professional license or registration. Includes state medical licenses (MD, DO), nursing licenses (RN, LPN, NP), DEA controlled substance registrations, state CDS permits, pharmacy licenses, and other professional certifications. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: medical_license|nursing_license|dea_registration|cds_permit|pharmacy_license|dental_license|optometry_license|podiatry_license|chiropractic_license|physical_therapy_license|occupational_therapy_license|behavioral_health_license|advanced_practice_license|physician_assistant_license|other — 15 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  practice_restrictions varchar [note: 'Any limitations or restrictions placed on the license by the issuing authority. May include supervision requirements, practice setting restrictions, or specific clinical limitations.']
  primary_source_verification_date date [note: 'The date the license was last verified directly with the issuing authority (primary source). NCQA requires PSV within 180 days of credentialing decision and every 36 months thereafter.']
  primary_source_verification_method varchar [note: 'The method used to verify the license with the primary source. Includes online state board portals, written correspondence, phone verification, third-party credentialing services, or automated API integration.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time this license record was first created in the data platform. Used for audit trail and data lineage tracking.']
  record_current_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this is the current active version of the license record. True for the current record; false for historical versions. Supports Type 2 slowly changing dimension queries.']
  record_effective_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time from which this version of the license record is effective for business reporting. Supports Type 2 slowly changing dimension tracking.']
  record_end_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this version of the license record was superseded by a new version. Null for the current active record. Supports Type 2 slowly changing dimension tracking.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time this license record was last modified in the data platform. Used for change tracking and audit purposes.']
  renewal_cycle_months varchar [note: 'The number of months between required renewals for this license type. Common values are 12, 24, or 36 months depending on state and license type.']
  renewal_date date [note: 'The date the license was last renewed. Used to track renewal cycles and ensure continuous licensure for credentialing purposes.']
  scope_of_practice varchar [note: 'Description of the clinical activities and services the provider is authorized to perform under this license. Varies by license type and state regulations. Used for state-specific scope-of-practice validation.']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'The unique identifier for this license record in the source operational system. Used for data lineage and reconciliation.']
  telemedicine_authorized_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the provider is authorized to deliver telemedicine services under this license. True if telemedicine practice is permitted; false otherwise. Critical for virtual care network management.']
  verification_source varchar [note: 'The specific entity or system used to perform primary source verification. Examples include state medical board website, NPDB, third-party credentialing verification organization (CVO), or automated verification service.']
  verification_url varchar [note: 'The web address of the state licensing board or regulatory authority where the license can be verified online. Used for automated primary source verification workflows.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'VREQ validation marker']

  Note: 'Single source of truth for all professional licenses, certifications, and regulatory registrations held by a provider. Covers state medical licenses (MD, DO, NP, PA, RN, LCSW, LPC, etc.), DEA controlled substance registrations (including authorized schedules II-V and registration state), CDS (state-level controlled dangerous substance) permits, state pharmacy licenses, and other regulatory registrations. Stores license/registration type, issuing authority (state medical board, state nursing board, DEA, CMS, state pharmacy board), license or registration number, authorized schedules (for DEA/CDS), issue date, expiration date, renewal date, status (active, suspended, revoked, expired, surrendered, pending renewal), disciplinary action flags, disciplinary action details, and primary source verification (PSV) date and source. Supports NCQA credentialing standards for PSV, multi-state licensure tracking via Interstate Medical Licensure Compact, controlled substance prescribing authorization, pharmacy benefit management workflows, and state-specific scope-of-practice validation. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table provider.affiliation {
  affiliation_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for affiliation']
  coordinator_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Affiliation coordination is handled by a specific employee who manages contracts, privileges, and network status for each affiliation.']
  group_practice_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to provider.group_practice. Business justification: affiliation should reference the medical group (group_practice) it belongs to; the existing column name does not match target PK naming, so a new FK column is added and the generic column removed.']
  practice_location_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the individual provider (physician, nurse practitioner, or other healthcare professional) who holds this affiliation. Links to the provider master entity.']
  accepting_new_patients_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator denoting whether the provider is accepting new patients through this affiliation. True indicates accepting new patients; False indicates not accepting new patients.']
  admitting_privileges_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator denoting whether the provider has admitting privileges at the affiliated hospital or facility. True indicates admitting privileges are granted; False indicates no admitting privileges.']
  affiliation_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the provider affiliation. Indicates whether the affiliation is active and in effect, inactive, suspended, pending approval, or terminated.']
  affiliation_type varchar [note: 'Categorical classification of the affiliation relationship. Indicates whether the provider is affiliated with a medical group, Independent Practice Association (IPA), Accountable Care Organization (ACO), health system, hospital, or other facility type.']
  billing_npi varchar [note: 'The National Provider Identifier (NPI) used for billing purposes in this affiliation context. May represent the organizational NPI (Type 2) of the affiliated entity.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this affiliation record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail and data lineage tracking.']
  credentialing_verification_date date [note: 'The date on which the provider\'s credentials and affiliation with the organization were last verified. Used to track compliance with credentialing re-verification requirements.']
  department_name varchar [note: 'The name of the department, division, or service line within the affiliated organization where the provider practices. Examples include Cardiology, Emergency Medicine, Orthopedic Surgery, Primary Care.']
  directory_display_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator denoting whether this affiliation should be displayed in the member-facing provider directory. True indicates the affiliation is publicly visible; False indicates it is for internal use only.']
  end_date date [note: 'The date on which the provider affiliation ended or is scheduled to end. Null for open-ended affiliations that are currently active.']
  last_updated_by varchar [note: 'The user ID or system identifier of the person or process that last updated this affiliation record. Supports audit and accountability requirements.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this affiliation record was last modified. Used for audit trail and change tracking.']
  medical_staff_category varchar [note: 'The category of medical staff membership the provider holds at the affiliated hospital or facility. Categories include Active Staff, Courtesy Staff, Consulting Staff, Honorary Staff, Affiliate Staff, and Provisional Staff.']
  network_participation_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator denoting whether this affiliation makes the provider eligible for participation in the health plan\'s provider network. True indicates network participation; False indicates non-participating affiliation.']
  next_credentialing_due_date date [note: 'The date by which the next credentialing verification for this affiliation is due. Supports proactive credentialing workflow management.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for capturing additional notes, comments, or special instructions related to the provider affiliation. May include details about practice restrictions, scheduling notes, or administrative remarks.']
  primary_affiliation_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator denoting whether this is the provider\'s primary organizational affiliation. True indicates this is the main affiliation; False indicates a secondary or additional affiliation.']
  role_title varchar [note: 'The provider\'s role or title within the affiliated organization. Examples include Staff Physician, Medical Director, Department Chair, Attending Physician, Consulting Physician.']
  source_record_reference varchar [note: 'The unique identifier of this affiliation record in the source system. Used for traceability and reconciliation with upstream systems.']
  start_date date [note: 'The date on which the provider affiliation became effective. Represents the beginning of the provider-organization relationship.']
  tin varchar [note: 'The Tax Identification Number (TIN) or Employer Identification Number (EIN) under which the provider bills for services rendered through this affiliation. Used for claims routing and payment processing.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'VREQ validation marker']
  created_by varchar [note: 'The user ID or system identifier of the person or process that created this affiliation record. Supports audit and accountability requirements.']

  Note: 'Captures the organizational affiliations of individual providers — medical group memberships, IPA affiliations, ACO participation, health system relationships, and hospital associations. Stores affiliation type, affiliated organization (group practice or facility reference), affiliation start and end dates, department, role, and active status. Supports provider directory accuracy, network configuration, claims routing logic, and understanding of provider-to-organization hierarchies. For hospital-based providers, captures the association with the facility where the provider practices. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table provider.group_practice {
  group_practice_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for group_practice']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Group practice financial statements require linking each practice group to its cost center for consolidated reporting.']
  group_manager_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Group Practice Management requires a designated practice manager employee overseeing operations, staffing, and compliance for the group.']
  medicare_provider_practice_location_id varchar [note: 'The Medicare-assigned provider identifier for the group practice, used for Medicare claims submission and enrollment.']
  practice_location_id varchar [note: 'The state-assigned Medicaid provider identifier for the group practice, used for Medicaid claims submission.']
  accepting_new_patients boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the group practice is currently accepting new patients. Used for provider directory accuracy and member access.']
  accessibility_accommodations varchar [note: 'Description of accessibility accommodations available at the group practice (e.g., wheelchair access, hearing loop, accessible exam tables) to comply with ADA requirements.']
  aco_name varchar [note: 'The name of the ACO in which the group practice participates, if applicable.']
  aco_participant boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the group practice participates in an Accountable Care Organization (ACO) for value-based care arrangements.']
  address_line_1 varchar [note: 'The primary street address line 1 of the group practice\'s main location or headquarters.']
  address_line_2 varchar [note: 'The primary street address line 2 (suite, floor, building) of the group practice\'s main location.']
  city varchar [note: 'The city where the group practice\'s primary location is situated.']
  cms_certification_number varchar [note: 'The CMS Certification Number (CCN) assigned to FQHC, RHC, or other certified facilities. Required for Medicare/Medicaid billing.']
  county varchar [note: 'The county in which the group practice\'s primary location is located. Used for network adequacy and geographic access reporting.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this group practice record was first created in the provider management system.']
  credentialing_date date [note: 'The date on which the group practice was initially credentialed and approved for network participation.']
  credentialing_status varchar [note: 'The current credentialing status of the group practice within the health plan\'s credentialing process.']
  data_source_system varchar [note: 'The name of the source system from which this group practice record originated (e.g., Cactus, ProviderSource, NPPES).']
  doing_business_as_name varchar [note: 'The trade name or DBA name under which the group practice operates, if different from the legal name.']
  effective_date date [note: 'The date on which the group practice\'s participation in the health plan network became effective.']
  email_address varchar [note: 'The primary email address for administrative and contracting communications with the group practice.']
  fax_number varchar [note: 'The fax number for the group practice, used for prior authorization and medical records transmission.']
  group_name varchar [note: 'The legal business name of the medical group, physician organization, or practice entity as registered with state authorities and CMS.']
  group_npi varchar [note: 'The 10-digit Type 2 NPI assigned to the group practice organization by CMS. This is the organizational NPI distinct from individual provider NPIs.']
  group_size varchar [note: 'The total number of individual providers (physicians, nurse practitioners, physician assistants) affiliated with and practicing under this group.']
  group_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the group practice organizational structure: solo practice (single physician), single specialty group, multi-specialty group, Independent Practice Association (IPA), Federally Qualified Health Center (FQHC), or Rural Health Clinic (RHC).']
  hospital_affiliation varchar [note: 'The name of the primary hospital or health system with which the group practice is affiliated or has admitting privileges.']
  language_services_offered varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of languages in which the group practice offers clinical services, used for provider directory cultural competency and member access.']
  participation_status varchar [note: 'The current participation status of the group practice in the health plan\'s provider network. Active indicates the group is contracted and accepting members.']
  pcmh_recognition_level varchar [note: 'The NCQA PCMH recognition level achieved by the group practice (Level 1, 2, or 3), with Level 3 being the highest.']
  pcmh_recognized boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the group practice has achieved NCQA Patient-Centered Medical Home (PCMH) recognition, qualifying for enhanced reimbursement and quality incentives.']
  phone_number varchar [note: 'The primary contact phone number for the group practice.']
  primary_specialty varchar [note: 'The primary medical specialty or service focus of the group practice (e.g., Family Medicine, Cardiology, Orthopedic Surgery, Multi-Specialty).']
  recredentialing_due_date date [note: 'The date by which the group practice must complete recredentialing to maintain network participation. NCQA requires recredentialing at least every 36 months.']
  state varchar [note: 'The two-letter state abbreviation for the group practice\'s primary location.']
  tax_identifier varchar [note: 'The federal tax identification number (TIN/EIN) assigned to the group practice by the IRS. Used for claims payment and 1099 reporting.']
  taxonomy_code varchar [note: 'The 10-character alphanumeric taxonomy code identifying the group\'s primary classification, specialty, and area of practice per the NUCC taxonomy.']
  telehealth_enabled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the group practice offers telehealth or telemedicine services to members.']
  termination_date date [note: 'The date on which the group practice\'s participation in the health plan network was terminated or is scheduled to terminate. Null for active participants.']
  termination_reason varchar [note: 'The reason for termination of the group practice\'s network participation (e.g., voluntary withdrawal, quality issues, credentialing failure, contract non-renewal).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this group practice record was last modified in the provider management system.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'VREQ validation marker']
  website_url varchar [note: 'The public website URL for the group practice, used in provider directory listings.']
  zip_code varchar [note: 'The 5-digit or 9-digit ZIP code for the group practice\'s primary location.']

  Note: 'Represents a medical group, physician organization, IPA, or multi-specialty group practice as a distinct business entity with its own Type 2 NPI and TIN. Stores group name, group NPI, TIN/EIN, group type (solo practice, group practice, IPA, FQHC, RHC), primary specialty, address, phone, CMS certification number, and group size. Serves as the organizational parent for individual provider affiliations and supports group-level contracting and network participation. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table provider.facility {
  facility_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the healthcare facility record. Primary key.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Facility operational costs are tracked against a cost center for capital budgeting and regulatory cost reporting.']
  accepting_new_patients_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the facility is currently accepting new patients. Used in provider directory and network adequacy reporting.']
  accreditation_body varchar [note: 'Organization that has accredited the facility. Values: joint_commission (The Joint Commission), dnv (DNV Healthcare), cihq (Center for Improvement in Healthcare Quality), aoa (American Osteopathic Association), aaahc (Accreditation Association for Ambulatory Health Care), achc (Accreditation Commission for Health Care), none (not accredited). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: joint_commission|dnv|cihq|aoa|aaahc|achc|none — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  accreditation_expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the current accreditation expires. Null if facility is not accredited.']
  address_line_1 varchar [note: 'Primary street address of the facility physical location.']
  address_line_2 varchar [note: 'Secondary address information such as suite, floor, or building number.']
  bed_count varchar [note: 'Total number of licensed beds at the facility. Used for network adequacy calculations and capacity planning.']
  ccn varchar [note: 'Six-character alphanumeric identifier assigned by CMS to Medicare/Medicaid certified facilities. Also known as Provider Number.']
  city varchar [note: 'City where the facility is located.']
  clia_number varchar [note: 'Ten-character identifier issued by CMS for facilities performing laboratory testing. Format: 2-digit state code + 1 letter + 7 digits.']
  county_name varchar [note: 'County where the facility is located. Used for network adequacy geographic analysis.']
  credentialing_effective_date date [note: 'Date when the current credentialing approval became effective.']
  credentialing_expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the current credentialing approval expires and recredentialing is required.']
  credentialing_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the facility credentialing process. Indicates whether the facility has passed credentialing review and is approved for network participation.']
  critical_access_hospital_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the facility is designated as a Critical Access Hospital under the Medicare Rural Hospital Flexibility Program.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the facility record or current participation status became effective.']
  email_address varchar [note: 'Primary email address for facility communications and electronic correspondence.']
  emergency_services_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the facility provides 24/7 emergency department services.']
  facility_name varchar [note: 'Legal name of the healthcare facility as registered with state and federal authorities.']
  facility_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the healthcare facility. Values: hospital (acute care hospital), snf (Skilled Nursing Facility), asc (Ambulatory Surgical Center), fqhc (Federally Qualified Health Center), rhc (Rural Health Clinic), behavioral_health (behavioral health facility). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: hospital|snf|asc|fqhc|rhc|behavioral_health|home_health|hospice|dialysis_center|dme_supplier|ltac|irf|imaging_center — promote to reference product]']
  fax_number varchar [note: 'Fax number for the facility, used for prior authorization and medical records transmission.']
  fhir_address varchar [note: 'FHIR Organization.address mapping']
  fhir_identifier varchar [note: 'FHIR Organization.identifier mapping']
  fhir_name varchar [note: 'FHIR Organization.name mapping']
  fhir_type varchar [note: 'FHIR Organization.type mapping']
  medicaid_certified_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the facility is certified to participate in the Medicaid program.']
  medicare_certified_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the facility is certified to participate in the Medicare program.']
  network_tier varchar [note: 'Tiering classification of the facility within the provider network. Tier 1 is preferred/lowest cost-sharing. Out_of_network indicates non-participating facility.']
  npi varchar [note: 'Type 2 NPI assigned to the facility by CMS. Ten-digit unique organizational identifier required for HIPAA transactions.']
  ownership_type varchar [note: 'Legal ownership structure of the facility. Values: for_profit (investor-owned), non_profit (tax-exempt), government (federal/state/local), tribal (Indian Health Service or tribal).']
  parent_organization_name varchar [note: 'Name of the parent health system or organization that owns or operates the facility. Null if facility is independent.']
  participation_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the facility in the provider network. Indicates whether the facility is actively participating, suspended, or terminated.']
  phone_number varchar [note: 'Primary contact phone number for the facility.']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'Five or nine-digit ZIP code of the facility location.']
  quality_rating decimal(3,2) [note: 'Overall quality rating score for the facility on a scale of 1.00 to 5.00. Derived from CMS Star Ratings, HEDIS measures, or internal quality assessments.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this facility record was first created in the data platform.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this facility record was last updated in the data platform.']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for this facility in the source system. Used for data lineage and reconciliation.']
  state_code varchar [note: 'Two-letter state abbreviation where the facility is located.']
  tax_identifier varchar [note: 'Federal Employer Identification Number (EIN) assigned by IRS. Used for claims payment and 1099 reporting.']
  teaching_hospital_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the facility is a teaching hospital affiliated with a medical school and residency programs.']
  telehealth_enabled_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the facility offers telehealth or virtual care services.']
  termination_date date [note: 'Date when the facility participation was terminated or is scheduled to terminate. Null if currently active.']
  trauma_level varchar [note: 'Trauma center designation level assigned by state or American College of Surgeons. Level 1 is highest capability. Not_designated indicates facility is not a trauma center.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'VREQ validation marker']
  website_url varchar [note: 'Public website URL for the facility. Used in provider directory.']

  Note: 'Master record for healthcare facilities — hospitals, SNFs, ASCs, FQHCs, RHCs, behavioral health facilities, home health agencies, hospices, dialysis centers, and DME suppliers. Stores facility name, facility type, CMS certification number (CCN), Medicare/Medicaid certification status, accreditation body (Joint Commission, DNV, CIHQ), accreditation expiration, bed count, trauma level, teaching hospital status, critical access hospital designation, CLIA number, and facility NPI. Distinct from individual provider records; supports institutional claims (837I) routing, network adequacy facility-type analysis, and CMS Star Rating facility attribution. Serves as the organizational anchor for hospital privilege tracking. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table provider.directory_entry {
  directory_entry_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for directory_entry']
  provider_directory_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the provider directory entry record. This is the primary key for the published directory entry, distinct from the internal provider master record.']
  health_plan_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific health plan for which this directory entry is published. A provider may have multiple directory entries across different plans.']
  practice_location_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the internal provider master record. Links this published directory entry to the authoritative provider identity in the provider domain.']
  provider_network_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the provider network in which this provider participates for this plan. Determines member access and cost-sharing tier.']
  accepting_new_patients_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the provider is currently accepting new patients for this plan and network. Critical for directory accuracy and member access.']
  accessibility_features varchar [note: 'Description of accessibility features available at the practice location (wheelchair access, hearing loop, accessible parking). Supports ADA compliance and member access.']
  attestation_method varchar [note: 'Method used to verify the directory information with the provider. Documents the verification approach for audit and compliance purposes.']
  attestation_status varchar [note: 'Status of the provider attestation or verification process for this directory entry. Tracks compliance with CMS directory accuracy requirements.']
  board_certifications varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of board certifications held by the provider. Demonstrates advanced training and specialty expertise.']
  contract_provider_contract_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to contract.provider_contract. Business justification: Directory Publication Report requires contract details for each provider entry to determine network participation terms.']
  directory_display_name varchar [note: 'Consumer-facing display name of the provider as it appears in the published directory. May differ from legal name for readability and member experience.']
  directory_publication_date date [note: 'Date when this directory entry was published or last updated in the member-facing provider directory. Required for CMS directory accuracy attestation.']
  gender varchar [note: 'Gender of the provider. Some members have preferences for provider gender, particularly for primary care and OB/GYN services.']
  graduation_year varchar [note: 'Year the provider graduated from medical school or professional training program. Helps members assess provider experience.']
  hospital_affiliation varchar [note: 'Name of hospital(s) where the provider has admitting privileges or primary affiliation. Important for continuity of care and member decision-making.']
  languages_spoken varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of languages spoken by the provider or available at the practice location. Critical for member access and cultural competency.']
  last_verified_date date [note: 'Date when the directory information was last verified with the provider or practice. CMS and state DOI mandate regular verification cycles (typically 90 days).']
  medical_school varchar [note: 'Name of the medical school or professional training institution where the provider received their degree. Provides credential transparency for members.']
  network_tier varchar [note: 'Cost-sharing tier for this provider within the plan network. Determines member copay, coinsurance, and out-of-pocket costs.']
  next_verification_due_date date [note: 'Date by which the next directory verification must be completed to maintain compliance with CMS and state DOI accuracy mandates.']
  npi varchar [note: 'Ten-digit National Provider Identifier assigned by CMS. The authoritative unique identifier for healthcare providers in the United States.']
  office_hours varchar [note: 'Text description of office hours for the practice location. Helps members understand availability for appointment scheduling.']
  participation_effective_date date [note: 'Date when the providers participation in this plan and network became effective. Determines when members can access the provider at in-network rates.']
  participation_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the providers participation in this specific plan and network. Determines whether the directory entry is published to members.']
  participation_termination_date date [note: 'Date when the providers participation in this plan and network ended or will end. Critical for member notification and continuity of care transitions.']
  pcp_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this provider is eligible to serve as a Primary Care Provider (PCP) for plan members. Relevant for HMO and POS plans requiring PCP selection.']
  practice_address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the practice location street address where the provider sees patients. Published in member-facing directory for appointment scheduling.']
  practice_address_line2 varchar [note: 'Second line of the practice location street address (suite, floor, building). Optional field for additional address detail.']
  practice_city varchar [note: 'City name of the practice location. Used for member search and network adequacy geographic analysis.']
  practice_county varchar [note: 'County name of the practice location. Required for state DOI network adequacy reporting and CMS service area compliance.']
  practice_email varchar [note: 'Email address for the practice location. May be published for member communication or used for administrative coordination.']
  practice_fax varchar [note: 'Fax number for the practice location. Used for prior authorization submissions and medical records exchange.']
  practice_location_name varchar [note: 'Name of the practice location, clinic, or facility where the provider sees patients for this directory entry. A provider may have multiple directory entries for different locations.']
  practice_phone varchar [note: 'Primary phone number for the practice location. Published in directory for member appointment scheduling and inquiries.']
  practice_state varchar [note: 'Two-letter state abbreviation of the practice location. Critical for state-specific network adequacy and regulatory compliance.']
  practice_website_url varchar [note: 'Website URL for the practice or provider. Published in directory to enable members to learn more about the provider and services offered.']
  practice_zip_code varchar [note: 'Five-digit or nine-digit ZIP code of the practice location. Used for member proximity search and network adequacy geo-access analysis.']
  provider_type varchar [note: 'High-level classification of the provider entity type. Determines directory presentation and search filtering options for members.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this directory entry record was first created in the data warehouse. Supports audit trail and data lineage tracking.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this directory entry record was last updated in the data warehouse. Tracks data freshness and change frequency.']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for this directory entry in the source system. Enables traceability and reconciliation with upstream provider management systems.']
  specialty_display varchar [note: 'Consumer-friendly specialty name displayed in the directory. Simplified from clinical taxonomy codes for member understanding.']
  telehealth_available_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the provider offers telehealth or virtual visit services for this plan. Increasingly important for member access and convenience.']
  tin varchar [note: 'Nine-digit Tax Identification Number (EIN or SSN) associated with the provider or practice for billing and contracting purposes.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'VREQ validation marker']

  Note: 'Published provider directory record representing the consumer-facing view of a provider\'s participation in a specific health plan and network. Captures provider display name, accepting new patients status, languages spoken, telehealth availability, network tier, plan participation, directory publication date, last verified date, and directory accuracy attestation status. Supports CMS and state DOI provider directory accuracy mandates (no-surprise billing, network adequacy). Distinct from the internal provider master — this is the published, plan-specific directory entry. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table provider.provider_directory_verification {
  provider_directory_verification_id varchar [pk, note: 'System‑generated unique identifier for each provider directory verification record.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the staff member or automated system that performed the verification.']
  practice_location_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the provider whose directory information is being verified.']
  current_record_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this row represents the current active version of the verification record.']
  fields_verified varchar [note: 'Pipe‑separated list of provider directory fields that were verified in this event (e.g., address|phone|specialty|accepting_patients).']
  next_verification_date date [note: 'Scheduled future date for the next required verification of this provider\'s directory information.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations captured during the verification process.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the verification record was first inserted into the lakehouse.']
  record_effective_date date [note: 'Date from which this version of the verification record is considered effective (SCD Type 2).']
  record_end_date date [note: 'Date when this version of the verification record ceased to be effective; null if current.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the verification record.']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'Native identifier of the verification record in the source system.']
  verification_method varchar [note: 'Channel used to conduct the verification (e.g., phone call, mailed questionnaire, online portal, provider attestation).']
  verification_number varchar [note: 'Business‑visible sequential number assigned to the verification event for tracking and reporting.']
  verification_outcome varchar [note: 'Result of the verification activity indicating whether the record was confirmed, required an update, could not be reached, or the provider was removed from the directory.']
  verification_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the verification record.']
  verification_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact date‑time when the verification activity was performed.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'VREQ validation marker']

  Note: 'Tracks the outreach and verification events conducted to confirm provider directory accuracy as required by CMS and state DOI mandates. Records verification method (phone, mail, online portal, attestation), verification date, verified by (staff ID or automated system), verification outcome (confirmed, updated, unable to reach, removed), fields verified (address, phone, accepting patients, specialty), and next scheduled verification date. Supports CMS quarterly directory accuracy reporting and no-surprise billing compliance. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table provider.npi_registry_sync {
  npi_registry_sync_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for each NPI registry synchronization event record.']
  practice_location_id varchar [note: 'Internal identifier linking this sync event to the provider master record in the Provider Management System.']
  address_discrepancy_detail varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the address discrepancy found between internal and NPPES records, including field-level differences.']
  address_discrepancy_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a discrepancy was detected between the internal provider address and the NPPES registry address during this sync event.']
  auto_applied_fields varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of field names that were automatically updated in the internal provider master record based on NPPES data during this sync event.']
  auto_applied_update_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether discrepancies found during this sync event were automatically applied to the internal provider master record without manual review.']
  claims_submission_risk_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this sync event identified a risk to claims submission, such as a deactivated NPI that could cause claim rejections.']
  credential_discrepancy_detail varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the credential discrepancy found between internal and NPPES records.']
  credential_discrepancy_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a discrepancy was detected between the internal provider credentials and the NPPES registry credentials during this sync event.']
  deactivation_reason_code varchar [note: 'The CMS-defined code indicating the reason for NPI deactivation: DT (Death), DB (Doing Business As), FR (Fraud), OT (Other).']
  deactivation_reason_description varchar [note: 'The full text description of the reason the NPI was deactivated in the NPPES registry.']
  directory_accuracy_impact_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this sync event identified discrepancies that impact provider directory accuracy and CMS directory accuracy mandates.']
  manual_review_assigned_to varchar [note: 'The user ID or team name to whom this sync discrepancy has been assigned for manual review and resolution.']
  manual_review_completed_date date [note: 'The date on which manual review of this sync event discrepancy was completed and resolved.']
  manual_review_reason varchar [note: 'The business reason why this sync event requires manual review, such as critical field discrepancies, deactivated NPI, or conflicting data.']
  manual_review_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this sync event identified discrepancies that require manual review and resolution by data stewardship or credentialing staff.']
  match_status varchar [note: 'The outcome of comparing the internal provider record against the NPPES registry data, indicating whether the NPI was found, matched, or has changed status.']
  name_discrepancy_detail varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the name discrepancy found between internal and NPPES records, including field-level differences.']
  name_discrepancy_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a discrepancy was detected between the internal provider name and the NPPES registry name during this sync event.']
  npi varchar [note: 'The 10-digit National Provider Identifier queried against the CMS NPPES registry during this synchronization event.']
  nppes_deactivation_date date [note: 'The date the NPI was deactivated in the NPPES registry, if applicable, as retrieved during this sync event.']
  nppes_enumeration_date date [note: 'The date the NPI was originally enumerated in the NPPES registry as retrieved during this sync event.']
  nppes_last_update_date date [note: 'The date the NPI record was last updated in the NPPES registry as retrieved during this sync event.']
  nppes_reactivation_date date [note: 'The date the NPI was reactivated in the NPPES registry, if applicable, as retrieved during this sync event.']
  nppes_response_code varchar [note: 'The HTTP or API response code returned by the NPPES registry during this sync event.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this NPI registry sync event record was first created in the data warehouse.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this NPI registry sync event record was last updated in the data warehouse.']
  resolution_action varchar [note: 'The action taken to resolve discrepancies identified during this sync event, indicating whether NPPES data was accepted, internal data was retained, or further escalation occurred.']
  resolution_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes documenting the rationale and details of the resolution action taken for this sync event.']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'The unique identifier for this sync event record in the source Provider Management System.']
  sync_error_code varchar [note: 'The error code returned if the sync event failed, indicating the technical or business reason for failure.']
  sync_error_message varchar [note: 'The detailed error message returned if the sync event failed, providing diagnostic information for troubleshooting.']
  sync_run_date date [note: 'The date on which this NPI registry synchronization event was executed.']
  sync_run_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The precise timestamp when this NPI registry synchronization event was initiated.']
  sync_source varchar [note: 'The source system or method used to retrieve NPI data from the CMS NPPES registry for this synchronization event.']
  sync_status varchar [note: 'The current status of this NPI registry synchronization event in its processing lifecycle.']
  taxonomy_discrepancy_detail varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the taxonomy code discrepancy found between internal and NPPES records, including specific taxonomy codes that differ.']
  taxonomy_discrepancy_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a discrepancy was detected between the internal provider taxonomy code and the NPPES registry taxonomy during this sync event.']
  total_discrepancies_count varchar [note: 'The total number of field-level discrepancies identified between the internal provider record and the NPPES registry data during this sync event.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'VREQ validation marker']

  Note: 'Tracks synchronization events between the internal provider master and the CMS NPPES NPI Registry to maintain provider data quality and regulatory compliance. Records sync run date, NPI queried, match status (exact match, partial match, unmatched, deactivated NPI, reactivated NPI), fields compared and discrepancies found (name, address, taxonomy, enumeration date, deactivation reason), sync source (NPPES weekly dissemination file, NPPES API real-time query), auto-applied updates, and discrepancy flags requiring manual review. Critical for preventing claims submission with deactivated NPIs, supporting new provider discovery, and maintaining directory accuracy per CMS provider enrollment standards. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table provider.sanction {
  sanction_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for sanction']
  exclusion_screening_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the screening event that detected this sanction. Links to the screening event record for audit trail purposes.']
  practice_location_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the provider who is subject to this sanction. Links to the provider master entity.']
  audit_trail_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes documenting the audit trail for this sanction record, including investigation details, stakeholder communications, and compliance actions taken.']
  cms_report_date date [note: 'The date on which this sanction was reported to CMS. Null if not yet reported or not reportable.']
  cms_reportable_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this sanction must be reported to CMS as part of program integrity reporting requirements. True if reportable, False otherwise.']
  current_record_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this is the current active version of the sanction record. True for the current version, False for historical versions. Used for slowly changing dimension (SCD) Type 2 tracking.']
  exclusion_waiver_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a waiver or exception was granted allowing the provider to continue participation despite the sanction. True if waiver granted, False otherwise.']
  match_details varchar [note: 'Detailed information about the match found during screening, including match score, matching fields (name, NPI, DOB), and any discrepancies requiring manual review.']
  ncqa_report_date date [note: 'The date on which this sanction was reported to NCQA. Null if not yet reported or not reportable.']
  ncqa_reportable_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this sanction must be reported to NCQA as part of credentialing and accreditation standards. True if reportable, False otherwise.']
  notification_date date [note: 'The date on which the sanction notification was sent to stakeholders. Null if notification has not been sent.']
  notification_sent_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a notification was sent to relevant stakeholders (provider, network management, claims processing) about the sanction. True if sent, False otherwise.']
  npi varchar [note: 'The 10-digit National Provider Identifier of the sanctioned provider. Required for OIG and SAM screening compliance.']
  participation_impact varchar [note: 'The impact of the sanction on the provider\'s participation status and payment eligibility within the health plan\'s network.']
  reason varchar [note: 'Detailed explanation of the reason for the sanction, including the nature of the violation or adverse action (e.g., fraud, patient abuse, controlled substance violation).']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this sanction record was first created in the data warehouse. Used for audit trail and data lineage.']
  record_effective_date date [note: 'The date from which this version of the sanction record is effective. Used for slowly changing dimension (SCD) Type 2 tracking.']
  record_end_date date [note: 'The date on which this version of the sanction record ceased to be effective. Null for the current version. Used for slowly changing dimension (SCD) Type 2 tracking.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this sanction record was last updated in the data warehouse. Used for audit trail and change tracking.']
  reinstatement_date date [note: 'The date on which the provider was reinstated or the sanction was lifted. Null if the sanction is still active.']
  resolution_action varchar [note: 'The action taken by the credentialing or compliance team in response to the screening result and sanction identification.']
  resolution_date date [note: 'The date on which the resolution action was completed and documented. Null if the sanction is still under investigation.']
  sanction_date date [note: 'The date on which the sanction or exclusion was officially imposed by the sanctioning authority.']
  sanction_type varchar [note: 'The category of sanction or exclusion imposed on the provider. Determines the scope and impact of the sanction on participation status.']
  screened_by varchar [note: 'Identifier of the staff member or automated system that performed the screening. May be a staff ID or system name (e.g., \'Automated Screening Service\').']
  screening_date date [note: 'The date on which the screening was performed that identified this sanction. Required for monthly OIG/SAM screening compliance.']
  screening_result varchar [note: 'The outcome of the screening event: clear (no match), match found (confirmed sanction), or potential match requiring manual review.']
  screening_source varchar [note: 'The authoritative database or list consulted during the screening event (e.g., OIG LEIE, SAM.gov, state Medicaid exclusion lists).']
  severity_level varchar [note: 'The severity classification of the sanction, indicating the level of risk and impact on provider participation and payment eligibility.']
  source varchar [note: 'The authoritative body or system that issued the sanction (e.g., OIG, SAM.gov, State Medicaid Agency, DEA, State Medical Board).']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'The unique identifier for this sanction record in the source system. Used for data lineage and reconciliation.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'VREQ validation marker']
  waiver_expiration_date date [note: 'The date on which the exclusion waiver expires and the sanction impact resumes. Null if no waiver granted or waiver is indefinite.']
  waiver_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation of the reason for granting an exclusion waiver, including business justification and regulatory approval details. Null if no waiver granted.']

  Note: 'Single source of truth for all sanctions, exclusions, adverse actions, and the periodic screening events that detect them. Captures sanction records: sanction type (OIG exclusion, SAM exclusion, state Medicaid exclusion, DEA revocation, medical board action, licensure disciplinary action), sanction source, sanction date, reinstatement date, sanction reason, severity level, and impact on participation status. Also captures screening events: screening date, screening source (OIG LEIE, SAM.gov, state Medicaid exclusion lists, EPLS), provider NPI screened, screening result (clear, match found, potential match requiring manual review), match details, resolution action, resolution date, and screened-by (staff ID or automated system). Supports mandatory monthly OIG/SAM exclusion screening compliance, NCQA credentialing standards, CMS program integrity requirements, Medicaid/Medicare fraud prevention, and complete audit trail for regulatory examinations. Critical for preventing payment to excluded providers and defending screening compliance during CMS and OIG audits. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table provider.exclusion_screening {
  exclusion_screening_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the exclusion screening event record.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'The system user identifier or employee ID of the individual or automated process that initiated the screening event.']
  practice_location_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the provider being screened against exclusion lists.']
  audit_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator (True/False) denoting whether this screening event has been flagged for audit review due to anomalies, policy violations, or regulatory examination requirements.']
  audit_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes documenting audit findings, reviewer comments, or regulatory examination references related to this screening event.']
  cms_reporting_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator (True/False) denoting whether this screening event must be included in CMS regulatory reporting submissions or program integrity audits.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'The compliance status of this screening event relative to regulatory requirements: compliant (on schedule), overdue (past due date), pending review (awaiting resolution), non-compliant (violation), or waived (exception granted).']
  data_source_version varchar [note: 'The version or publication date of the exclusion list data source used for this screening, ensuring traceability to the specific list snapshot consulted.']
  exclusion_effective_date date [note: 'The date on which the exclusion became effective, as reported by the exclusion list source. Null if no match found.']
  exclusion_end_date date [note: 'The date on which the exclusion is scheduled to end or was lifted, if applicable. Null for indefinite exclusions or no match.']
  exclusion_reason varchar [note: 'The reason or statutory basis for the exclusion as reported by the exclusion list source (e.g., fraud, patient abuse, license revocation). Null if no match found.']
  exclusion_type varchar [note: 'The scope of the exclusion found: Federal (Medicare/Medicaid), State (state-specific Medicaid), Both (federal and state), or None (no exclusion).']
  match_details varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative or structured information about the match, including matched data elements, exclusion list entry identifiers, and any discrepancies requiring review.']
  match_type varchar [note: 'The type of match logic that triggered a positive or potential screening result, indicating which data elements matched the exclusion list entry.']
  next_screening_due_date date [note: 'The date by which the next exclusion screening is required for this provider to maintain compliance with CMS monthly screening mandates.']
  npi varchar [note: 'The 10-digit National Provider Identifier of the provider being screened, as assigned by CMS.']
  prior_screening_date date [note: 'The date of the most recent prior exclusion screening for this provider, used to track screening cadence and compliance with monthly requirements.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this exclusion screening record was first created in the system.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this exclusion screening record was last modified or updated.']
  resolution_action varchar [note: 'The action taken by the health plan in response to the screening result: no action (clear result), provider termination, contract suspension, pending manual review, false positive confirmation, or waiver granted per policy.']
  resolution_date date [note: 'The date on which the resolution action was completed or the screening result was finalized. Null if resolution is still pending.']
  resolution_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes documenting the resolution process, including rationale for the action taken, supporting evidence reviewed, and any exceptions or waivers applied.']
  screened_by_name varchar [note: 'The full name of the individual or system process that performed the screening, for audit trail purposes.']
  screening_date date [note: 'The date on which the exclusion screening was performed.']
  screening_frequency varchar [note: 'The scheduled frequency or trigger for this screening event: monthly (CMS-required), quarterly, annual, ad hoc (event-driven), or initial credentialing.']
  screening_method varchar [note: 'The method or channel used to perform the exclusion screening: automated batch process, manual lookup by staff, real-time API integration, or third-party vendor service.']
  screening_result varchar [note: 'The outcome of the exclusion screening: Clear (no match), Match Found (confirmed exclusion), Potential Match (requires manual review), Inconclusive (insufficient data), or Error (screening system failure).']
  screening_source varchar [note: 'The authoritative exclusion list source(s) checked during this screening event (OIG List of Excluded Individuals and Entities, System for Award Management, state Medicaid exclusion lists, or General Services Administration Excluded Parties List System).']
  screening_vendor varchar [note: 'The name of the third-party vendor or service provider used to perform the exclusion screening, if applicable. Null for in-house screenings.']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'The unique identifier for this exclusion screening record in the source system, used for data lineage and reconciliation.']
  state_reporting_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator (True/False) denoting whether this screening event must be reported to state Department of Insurance or Medicaid agencies per state-specific requirements.']
  vendor_transaction_reference varchar [note: 'The unique transaction or reference identifier assigned by the third-party screening vendor for this screening event, used for vendor reconciliation and support.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'VREQ validation marker']

  Note: 'Tracks the periodic OIG/SAM exclusion screening events performed against the provider roster. Records screening date, screening source (OIG LEIE, SAM.gov, state Medicaid exclusion list), provider NPI screened, screening result (clear, match found, potential match), match details, resolution action, and screened by. Supports monthly CMS-required exclusion screening compliance, audit trail for regulatory examinations, and Medicaid/Medicare program integrity requirements. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table provider.provider_outreach {
  provider_outreach_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the provider outreach event. Primary key for the provider outreach data product.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the health plan staff member who conducted this outreach event, supporting workforce tracking and audit trails.']
  outreach_campaign_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the broader outreach campaign or initiative that this outreach event is part of, supporting batch verification and reporting.']
  practice_location_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the healthcare provider who is the subject of this outreach event. Links to the provider master data.']
  vendor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vendor.vendor. Business justification: Vendor Outreach Management process tracks outreach activities from providers to vendors for credentialing and compliance.']
  accepting_patients_verified_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether the provider accepting new patients status was verified during this outreach event.']
  address_verified_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether the provider practice address was verified during this outreach event.']
  attempt_count varchar [note: 'Number of outreach attempts made for this specific outreach event or campaign, tracking persistence in reaching the provider.']
  attestation_date date [note: 'Date when the provider attestation or confirmation was received, supporting regulatory audit trails.']
  attestation_method varchar [note: 'Method or channel through which the provider attestation was received.']
  attestation_received_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether a formal attestation or confirmation document was received from the provider during this outreach event.']
  compliance_quarter varchar [note: 'Fiscal or calendar quarter for which this outreach event supports directory accuracy compliance reporting (e.g., Q1 2024).']
  contact_email_address varchar [note: 'Email address used to reach the provider during this outreach event.']
  contact_person_name varchar [note: 'Name of the provider or authorized representative who was contacted during this outreach event.']
  contact_phone_number varchar [note: 'Phone number used to reach the provider during this outreach event.']
  contact_reached_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether the provider or their authorized representative was successfully reached during this outreach event.']
  contract_provider_contract_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to contract.provider_contract. Business justification: Outreach compliance tracking ties outreach actions to the governing contract to ensure activities meet contractual obligations.']
  current_record_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether this is the current active version of the outreach record, supporting Type 2 slowly changing dimension logic.']
  data_updated_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether provider directory data was modified or corrected as a result of this outreach event.']
  data_verified_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether provider directory data was successfully verified or confirmed during this outreach event.']
  directory_removal_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether the provider was removed from the directory as a result of this outreach event (e.g., unable to reach, no longer participating).']
  fields_verified varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list or description of specific provider data fields that were verified during this outreach event (e.g., address, phone, accepting patients, specialty, hours).']
  follow_up_reason varchar [note: 'Description of why follow-up outreach is required, providing context for next steps and escalation.']
  follow_up_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether additional follow-up outreach is required based on the outcome of this event.']
  hours_verified_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether the provider office hours were verified during this outreach event.']
  next_verification_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next directory verification outreach event with this provider, supporting quarterly verification compliance.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes or comments documenting details of the outreach conversation, provider responses, and any issues encountered.']
  outcome varchar [note: 'Result or disposition of the outreach attempt, indicating whether contact was successful and what action was taken.']
  outreach_date date [note: 'Date when the outreach event was conducted or attempted. Primary business event date for this transaction.']
  outreach_method varchar [note: 'Communication channel or medium used to conduct the outreach event with the provider.']
  outreach_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the outreach event, tracking progression from initiation through completion or cancellation.']
  outreach_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Precise date and time when the outreach event was initiated or conducted, supporting detailed audit trails and SLA tracking.']
  outreach_type varchar [note: 'Category of outreach activity conducted with the provider. Determines the business purpose and workflow for the outreach event.']
  phone_verified_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether the provider phone number was verified during this outreach event.']
  purpose varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the specific business purpose or objective for this outreach event, providing context beyond the outreach type.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this outreach record was first created in the data platform, supporting audit trails and data lineage.']
  record_effective_date date [note: 'Date from which this outreach record version is effective, supporting temporal data management and historical analysis.']
  record_end_date date [note: 'Date until which this outreach record version is effective, supporting temporal data management and historical analysis. Null indicates current record.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this outreach record was last modified in the data platform, supporting change tracking and audit trails.']
  reference_number varchar [note: 'Business-facing reference number or tracking code for this outreach event, used for audit trails and provider communications.']
  removal_reason varchar [note: 'Description of why the provider was removed from the directory, supporting compliance documentation and audit trails.']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for this outreach event in the source operational system, supporting data lineage and reconciliation.']
  specialty_verified_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether the provider specialty information was verified during this outreach event.']
  staff_member_name varchar [note: 'Name of the health plan staff member or provider relations representative who conducted this outreach event.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'VREQ validation marker']

  Note: 'Single source of truth for all outreach, verification, and communication events with providers. Covers directory verification outreach (phone, mail, online portal, attestation), credentialing follow-up, contract execution outreach, network recruitment contacts, and ad-hoc provider communications. Records outreach type, outreach date, outreach purpose (directory verification, re-credentialing reminder, contract renewal, network recruitment, data quality correction), outreach method (phone, email, mail, portal, fax, in-person), outreach outcome (reached, confirmed, updated, voicemail, no response, unable to reach, removed from directory), fields verified (address, phone, accepting patients, specialty, hours), staff member conducting outreach, next scheduled verification date, follow-up required flag, and attempt count. Supports CMS quarterly directory accuracy reporting, no-surprise billing compliance, state DOI directory accuracy mandates, provider relations workflows, and regulatory audit trails. This is the authoritative record for demonstrating directory verification compliance during CMS and state audits. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table provider.participation_status {
  participation_status_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the provider participation status record.']
  health_plan_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the health plan associated with this participation status. Links to the plan master entity.']
  practice_location_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the healthcare provider whose participation status is being tracked. Links to the provider master entity.']
  provider_network_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the provider network in which the provider participates. Links to the network master entity.']
  accepting_new_patients_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the provider is currently accepting new patients within this network and plan. Critical for provider directory accuracy and member access to care.']
  claims_adjudication_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether claims from this provider should be adjudicated as in-network for this plan and network. This is the authoritative flag for claims processing network determination.']
  continuity_of_care_end_date date [note: 'The date through which continuity of care provisions apply for members in active treatment with this provider. Allows in-network benefits to continue for a transition period after provider termination.']
  contract_provider_contract_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the provider contract governing this participation relationship. Links to the provider contract entity.']
  credentialing_approval_date date [note: 'The date on which the provider was approved through the credentialing process for this participation arrangement.']
  credentialing_status varchar [note: 'The current credentialing status of the provider for this participation arrangement. Credentialing approval is a prerequisite for active participation status.']
  current_record_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this is the current active version of the participation status record. True for the most recent version, false for historical versions.']
  directory_display_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the provider should be displayed in the member-facing provider directory for this network and plan. May be false during pending credentialing or for providers with restricted panel status.']
  effective_date date [note: 'The date on which this participation status becomes effective. Claims with service dates on or after this date are subject to this participation status for network determination.']
  lob_code varchar [note: 'The line of business for which this participation status applies. Determines the regulatory framework and benefit structure applicable to this participation relationship.']
  member_notification_date date [note: 'The date on which affected members were notified of the provider participation status change. Required for regulatory compliance with provider termination notification requirements.']
  member_notification_method varchar [note: 'The communication channel used to notify members of the provider participation status change.']
  network_tier_code varchar [note: 'The network tier assignment for this provider participation. Determines member cost-sharing levels in tiered network products.']
  next_recredentialing_date date [note: 'The date by which the provider must complete recredentialing to maintain active participation status. Typically occurs every 24-36 months per NCQA standards.']
  panel_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the provider panel is open to new member assignments. Closed or restricted panels may still serve existing members but do not accept new PCP assignments.']
  participation_category varchar [note: 'The category of participation indicating the scope of services the provider is authorized to deliver under this arrangement.']
  participation_status_code varchar [note: 'Current participation status of the provider within the network and plan. Active status indicates the provider is eligible for in-network claims adjudication. This is the authoritative field for network participation determination.']
  participation_status_name varchar [note: 'Human-readable description of the participation status code.']
  pcp_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the provider is participating as a primary care provider in this network and plan. Determines PCP assignment eligibility for HMO and POS products.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this participation status record was first created in the data platform.']
  record_effective_date date [note: 'The business effective date of this participation status record version. Used for slowly changing dimension type 2 historization.']
  record_end_date date [note: 'The business end date of this participation status record version. Null for the current active version. Used for slowly changing dimension type 2 historization.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this participation status record was last updated in the data platform.']
  regulatory_sanction_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the provider is currently under regulatory sanction that affects their participation status. Sanctions may be imposed by state medical boards, CMS, or other regulatory bodies.']
  risk_arrangement_code varchar [note: 'The financial risk arrangement under which the provider participates. Indicates whether the provider is paid fee-for-service, capitation, or under a value-based care model.']
  sanction_effective_date date [note: 'The date on which a regulatory sanction affecting participation status became effective.']
  sanction_end_date date [note: 'The date on which a regulatory sanction affecting participation status is scheduled to end or was lifted.']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'The unique identifier for this participation status record in the source system. Used for data lineage and reconciliation.']
  specialist_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the provider is participating as a specialist in this network and plan. Used for network adequacy reporting and referral management.']
  status_change_trigger varchar [note: 'The business event or process that triggered this participation status change. Used for audit trail and root cause analysis of network changes. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: CREDENTIALING_DECISION|CONTRACT_EXECUTION|CONTRACT_TERMINATION|SANCTION_IMPOSED|VOLUNTARY_REQUEST|NETWORK_CHANGE|RECREDENTIALING_OUTCOME — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  telehealth_enabled_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the provider offers telehealth services under this participation arrangement. Required for provider directory display and member access to virtual care.']
  termination_date date [note: 'The date on which this participation status ends. Null for active, ongoing participation. Claims with service dates after this date are subject to out-of-network adjudication unless continuity of care provisions apply.']
  termination_reason_code varchar [note: 'Standardized code indicating the reason for participation termination. Required for regulatory reporting and member notification requirements.']
  termination_reason_description varchar [note: 'Detailed explanation of the termination reason. Provides additional context beyond the standardized termination reason code.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'VREQ validation marker']

  Note: 'Tracks the participation status history of a provider within a specific health plan, network, and line of business (LOB). Records participation status (active, inactive, terminated, suspended, pending credentialing), effective date, termination date, termination reason code, LOB (commercial, Medicare Advantage, Medicaid, CHIP, marketplace/QHP), network ID, and status change trigger (credentialing decision, contract termination, sanction, voluntary withdrawal). This is the authoritative record for claims adjudication in-network/out-of-network determination. Supports member notification requirements for provider terminations, continuity of care provisions, and regulatory reporting of network changes. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

  registration_state double [note: 'Two-letter US state code where the DEA registration was issued. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: AL|AK|AZ|AR|CA|CO|CT|DE|FL|GA|HI|ID|IL|IN|IA|KS|KY|LA|ME|MD|MA|MI|MN|MS|MO|MT|NE|NV|NH|NJ|NM|NY|NC|ND|OH|OK|OR|PA|RI|SC|SD|TN|TX|UT|VT|VA|WA|WV|WI|WY — promote to reference product]']
  registration_status double [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the DEA registration.']
  registration_type double [note: 'Indicates whether the registration is for an individual provider or an organization.']
  schedule_authorized varchar [note: 'DEA schedule(s) the provider is authorized to prescribe (II, III, IV, V).']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the DEA registration record in the source system.']
  verification_date date [note: 'Date the DEA registration information was last verified against the primary source.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'VREQ validation marker']

  Note: 'Tracks Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA) registration records for providers authorized to prescribe controlled substances. Stores DEA registration number, DEA schedules authorized (II, III, IV, V), registration state, issue date, expiration date, registration status (active, expired, revoked, surrendered), and primary source verification date. Required for NCQA credentialing standards for prescribing providers and supports pharmacy benefit management and prior authorization workflows. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table provider.obligation_compliance {
  obligation_compliance_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  practice_location_id varchar [note: 'FK to provider']

  compliance_notes varchar [note: 'Compliance notes']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance status']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record creation timestamp']
  finding_description varchar [note: 'Description of finding']
  finding_summary varchar [note: 'Summary of finding']
  is_compliant boolean [note: 'Whether provider is compliant']
  last_assessment_date date [note: 'Last assessment date']
  next_due_date date [note: 'Next due date']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Next review date']
  obligation_type varchar [note: 'Type of obligation']
  remediation_due_date date [note: 'Remediation due date']
  remediation_notes varchar [note: 'Remediation notes']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record update timestamp']

  Note: 'This association captures the compliance relationship between a provider and a regulatory obligation. Each record links one provider to one regulatory obligation and stores compliance_status and last_assessment_date, which are specific to that link.. Existence Justification: Providers must meet many regulatory obligations, and each regulatory obligation applies to many providers. The compliance team actively tracks the compliance status and assessment dates for each provider‑obligation pair, creating a distinct record for every association. This operational process requires a many‑to‑many association with its own attributes. [FHIR-aligned]'
}
