  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the reviewer record.']
  urac_qualified_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the reviewer meets URAC accreditation qualifications.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Incremental version number for optimistic concurrency control.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'VREQ validation marker']
  zip_code varchar [note: 'Postal code of reviewer’s address.']

  Note: 'Master entity for UM clinical reviewers — nurses, medical directors, and physician advisors who conduct UM and PA reviews. Captures reviewer NPI (if applicable), reviewer name, credential type (RN, MD, PharmD, LCSW), specialty, active status, state licensure details, URAC/NCQA reviewer qualification status, assigned review queues, and delegation authority level. Distinct from the provider domain — this entity represents internal plan staff performing UM functions. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table utilization.pa_notification {
  pa_notification_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each prior authorization notification record.']
  claim_header_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the claim associated with the prior authorization, if the notification relates to a claim.']
  facility_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the facility (e.g., hospital, clinic) receiving the notification, when applicable.']
  health_plan_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to plan.health_plan. Business justification: PA Notification Compliance tracking needs the originating health plan for audit trails.']
  member_subscriber_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member to whom the notification is addressed.']
  pa_request_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to utilization.pa_request. Business justification: pa_notification must reference the PA request it notifies about; child (notification) gets FK to parent (pa_request).']
  practice_location_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the health care provider receiving the notification, when applicable.']
  primary_pa_employee_id varchar [note: 'System user identifier who created the notification record.']
  vendor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vendor.vendor. Business justification: Notification Audit Log records which vendor received the prior‑auth decision notification for traceability.']
  acknowledgment_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the recipient acknowledged receipt of the notification, if applicable.']
  approval_expiration_date date [note: 'Date on which an approved prior authorization expires, if applicable.']
  attachment_indicator boolean [note: 'True if the notification includes an attached document (e.g., detailed denial letter).']
  compliance_state varchar [note: 'Current compliance status of the notification with applicable accreditation or regulatory rules.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the notification record was first created in the data warehouse.']
  decision_reference varchar [note: 'Identifier of the prior authorization request or decision that triggered this notification.']
  delivery_channel varchar [note: 'The medium used to deliver the notification to the recipient.']
  delivery_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the notification delivery process.']
  delivery_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the delivery channel confirmed successful transmission or receipt.']
  denial_reason_code varchar [note: 'Standardized code representing the reason for a denial, when notification_type is denial.']
  denial_reason_description varchar [note: 'Human‑readable description of the denial reason.']
  is_urgent boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the notification requires expedited handling.']
  language_code varchar [note: 'ISO 639‑1 code of the language used for the notification content.']
  message_body varchar [note: 'Full text content of the notification sent to the recipient.']
  notification_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to the notification, used for tracking and reference in communications.']
  notification_status varchar [note: 'Overall lifecycle state of the notification record within the system.']
  notification_type varchar [note: 'Category of the notification indicating the decision outcome of the prior authorization request.']
  priority_level varchar [note: 'Business priority assigned to the notification for processing and escalation.']
  recipient_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the notification is addressed to a member, a health care provider, or a facility.']
  regulatory_reference varchar [note: 'Regulatory framework or mandate that requires this notification to be sent.']
  sent_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the notification was transmitted to the delivery channel.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the notification record.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'VREQ validation marker']

  Note: 'Records all required notifications sent to members and providers regarding PA decisions, pend status, and denial notices. Captures notification type (approval notice, denial notice, pend notice, expedited acknowledgment), recipient type (member, provider, facility), delivery channel (mail, fax, portal, phone), sent timestamp, delivery confirmation, and regulatory notice requirement reference (ACA, state mandate, CMS MA). Supports NCQA UM accreditation notification standards and state PA reform mandates. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table utilization.inpatient_admission {
  inpatient_admission_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the inpatient admission record.']
  clinical_criteria_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the specific clinical rule used for concurrent review.']
  enrollment_eligibility_span_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to enrollment.enrollment_eligibility_span. Business justification: Admission eligibility checks need the member\'s enrollment eligibility span to confirm benefit coverage dates, essential for clinical validation and regulatory audit of inpatient services.']
  health_plan_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to plan.health_plan. Business justification: Inpatient Admission Utilization reports are generated per health plan for network adequacy analysis.']
  member_subscriber_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the insured member associated with the admission.']
  actual_cost_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Final cost incurred for the admission after discharge.']
  actual_los_days varchar [note: 'Number of days the member actually stayed in the facility.']
  admission_date date [note: 'Date the member was admitted to the facility.']
  admission_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to the admission by the health plan.']
  admission_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the admission.']
  admission_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the admission based on urgency.']
  authorization_number varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the payer\'s authorization for this admission.']
  clinical_criteria_version varchar [note: 'Version of the clinical criteria set (e.g., InterQual v2023) applied to the admission.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the admission record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for cost fields.']
  denial_reason_code varchar [note: 'Standardized code representing why the admission was denied.']
  denial_reason_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the denial reason.']
  discharge_date decimal(18,2) [note: 'Date the member was discharged from the facility.']
  discharge_disposition decimal(18,2) [note: 'Post‑discharge destination of the member.']
  drg_code varchar [note: 'DRG assignment for the admission used for payment and benchmarking.']
  expected_cost_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Projected cost of the admission before services are rendered.']
  expected_los_days varchar [note: 'Projected number of days the member is expected to stay, based on clinical criteria.']
  facility_npi varchar [note: 'NPI of the admitting facility where the inpatient stay began.']
  fhir_class varchar [note: 'FHIR Encounter.class mapping']
  fhir_period varchar [note: 'FHIR Encounter.period mapping']
  fhir_status varchar [note: 'FHIR Encounter.status mapping']
  fhir_subject varchar [note: 'FHIR Encounter.subject mapping']
  is_critical_care boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the admission involved critical care services.']
  is_readmission boolean [note: 'True if the admission is a readmission within the defined look‑back period.']
  los_benchmark_met_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether actual LOS met the benchmark target.']
  los_target_days varchar [note: 'Benchmark target days for LOS based on plan and diagnosis.']
  payer_authorization_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the payer\'s prior‑authorization for the admission.']
  physician_npi varchar [note: 'NPI of the physician responsible for the admission.']
  primary_diagnosis_code varchar [note: 'ICD code representing the principal diagnosis for the admission.']
  readmission_within_30_days boolean [note: 'True if the admission occurs within 30 days of a prior discharge.']
  review_decision varchar [note: 'Outcome of the utilization management review.']
  review_decision_date date [note: 'Date the UM reviewer rendered a decision.']
  review_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the utilization management review.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the admission record.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'VREQ validation marker']

  Note: 'UM-managed inpatient admission record for admissions subject to concurrent review. Captures admitting facility NPI, admitting physician NPI, admission date, admission type (elective, urgent, emergent), primary admitting diagnosis (ICD), DRG assignment, expected LOS, actual discharge date, discharge disposition (home, SNF, rehab, expired), and payer authorization status. Serves as the anchor for concurrent review workflows and LOS benchmark comparisons. Distinct from the claim domain\'s institutional claim — this is the clinical/UM view of the admission, not the billing view. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table utilization.um_program {
  um_program_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each UM program definition.']
  compliance_regulatory_obligation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_obligation. Business justification: Programs are designed to meet regulatory requirements; the FK supports program‑to‑obligation reporting.']
  health_plan_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to plan.health_plan. Business justification: UM Program Enrollment reports require associating programs with the health plans they serve.']
  program_owner_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Program Ownership Management requires linking each utilization program to the responsible HR employee for accountability and budgeting.']
  risk_pool_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to risk.pool. Business justification: Required for underwriting and pricing reports that allocate program costs by risk pool; program eligibility depends on the assigned risk pool.']
  accreditation_category varchar [note: 'Specific NCQA/URAC accreditation domain the program addresses (Turn‑Around‑Time, Criteria, Notification, Delegation, Peer‑to‑Peer).']
  accreditation_status varchar [note: 'Overall compliance status with NCQA/URAC accreditation standards.']
  accreditation_survey_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent accreditation survey for this program.']
  clinical_criteria_set varchar [note: 'Name of the InterQual or MCG criteria set assigned to the program.']
  compliance_notes varchar [note: 'Free‑text field for additional compliance observations or exceptions.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the UM program record was first created in the data lake.']
  criteria_effective_date date [note: 'Date on which the assigned clinical criteria become effective for the program.']
  criteria_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the clinical criteria set (e.g., v2024.1).']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the UM program becomes operational.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the UM program is retired or superseded (null if open‑ended).']
  gap_analysis_date date [note: 'Date when the most recent gap analysis was completed.']
  gap_analysis_status varchar [note: 'Current state of the gap analysis performed against accreditation requirements.']
  line_of_business varchar [note: 'Business segment(s) to which the UM program is applicable.']
  next_review_due_date date [note: 'Planned date for the next formal program review or update.']
  pa_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether prior authorization is mandatory for services under this program.']
  program_code varchar [note: 'External business identifier or code used to reference the UM program in contracts and reports.']
  program_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the utilization management program.']
  program_notes varchar [note: 'Additional internal comments or documentation about the UM program.']
  program_type varchar [note: 'Category of services the UM program applies to.']
  program_version varchar [note: 'Version label for the program definition (e.g., v1.0, v2.3).']
  regulatory_reference varchar [note: 'Citation to the specific NCQA, URAC, or state DOI regulation governing the program.']
  review_type_scope varchar [note: 'Scope of review types covered by the program.']
  services_covered varchar [note: 'Free‑text list or coded reference of clinical services that require UM review under this program.']
  um_program_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative describing the purpose, scope, and key features of the UM program.']
  um_program_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the UM program.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the UM program record.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'VREQ validation marker']

  Note: 'Master reference for the health plan\'s UM program configurations — the formal UM program definitions required by NCQA, URAC, and state DOI. Captures program name, program type (inpatient UM, outpatient UM, behavioral health UM, pharmacy UM, specialty drug UM), applicable lines of business, clinical criteria set assigned (InterQual/MCG version and effective date), review type scope, NCQA/URAC accreditation compliance status by standard category (TAT, criteria, notification, delegation, P2P), accreditation survey dates, and current gap analysis. Governs which services require PA and which clinical criteria apply. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table utilization.pa_required_service {
  pa_required_service_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for each PA requirement record.']
  health_plan_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the health insurance plan to which this PA rule applies.']
  pa_request_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to utilization.pa_request. Business justification: pa_required_service defines services required for a specific PA request; child (required_service) gets FK to parent (pa_request).']
  clinical_criteria_set varchar [note: 'Name of the clinical criteria set (e.g., InterQual, MCG) used for evaluation.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the PA requirement becomes effective.']
  exemption_type varchar [note: 'Reason why PA may be exempted for this service.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the PA requirement ends; null if indefinite.']
  gold_card_approval_rate_met_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates if the provider met the approval rate threshold.']
  gold_card_approval_rate_threshold decimal(5,2) [note: 'Minimum approval rate percentage required for gold card eligibility.']
  gold_card_effective_date date [note: 'Start date of gold card exemption.']
  gold_card_expiration_date date [note: 'End date of gold card exemption.']
  gold_card_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates if a gold card exemption applies.']
  gold_card_provider_npi varchar [note: 'National Provider Identifier of the provider granted gold card status.']
  gold_card_revocation_reason varchar [note: 'Reason for revoking gold card status.']
  line_of_business varchar [note: 'Business segment for the plan (e.g., commercial, Medicare Advantage).']
  pa_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether prior authorization is required for the service.']
  pa_required_service_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the PA requirement record.']
  pa_type varchar [note: 'Type of PA process applicable.']
  provider_specialty_exemption_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates if the provider\'s specialty grants an exemption.']
  record_audit_created timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the record was first created in the system.']
  record_audit_updated timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the record.']
  regulatory_citation varchar [note: 'Reference to the regulatory rule or statute governing the PA requirement.']
  service_code varchar [note: 'The standardized code representing the medical service or procedure.']
  service_description varchar [note: 'Human readable description of the service.']
  updated_by varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user who last updated the record.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'VREQ validation marker']
  created_by varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user who created the record.']

  Note: 'Unified reference master defining PA requirements, exemptions, and gold card overrides by service, provider, plan, and line of business. Captures CPT/HCPCS code or service category, plan ID, line of business (commercial, Medicare Advantage, Medicaid), effective date, PA required/exempt flag, exemption type (state mandate, CMS requirement, gold card, plan policy), PA type (standard, expedited, concurrent), applicable clinical criteria set, regulatory citation, and provider specialty exemption criteria. For gold card entries: provider NPI, gold card effective/expiration dates, approval rate threshold met, qualifying performance period, and revocation reason. Drives PA intake routing, provider-facing PA requirement lookups, state PA reform compliance, and gold card mandate tracking. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

  termination_reason_description varchar [note: 'Human‑readable explanation of the termination reason.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the delegation record.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'VREQ validation marker']

  Note: 'Master entity tracking UM delegation arrangements where the health plan delegates UM functions to an external entity — TPA, health system, ACO, IPA, or specialty vendor. Captures delegated entity name and type, delegated UM functions (PA, concurrent review, retrospective review), delegation effective/termination dates, performance metrics, oversight audit schedule and results, NCQA delegation compliance status, sub-delegation restrictions, and corrective action plan references. Required for NCQA UM accreditation delegation oversight standards and state DOI delegation reporting. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

  effective_until date [note: 'Date on which the policy ceases to be binding; null for open‑ended policies.']
  is_emergency_covered boolean [note: 'Indicates whether emergency services are covered without prior authorization.']

  is_experimental_covered boolean [note: 'True if experimental or investigational services are permitted under the policy.']

  policy_number varchar [note: 'External business identifier assigned to the policy, used in member communications and claim adjudication.']
  policy_type varchar [note: 'Category of the policy indicating the primary clinical domain it governs.']
  prior_auth_approval_timeframe_days varchar [note: 'Maximum number of calendar days allowed to approve a prior authorization request.']
  regulatory_reference varchar [note: 'Citation to the regulatory rule or guideline that mandates this policy.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the most recent modification to the policy record.']
  version_effective_date date [note: 'Date when this version of the policy became effective.']
  version_expiration_date date [note: 'Date when this version of the policy was superseded or retired.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Sequential version identifier for policy revisions.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'VREQ validation marker']
  created_by varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user or system that created the policy record.']

  Note: 'Master reference for medical policies and clinical criteria used in utilization management decisions — including medical necessity criteria, clinical guidelines, evidence-based medicine references, and policy effective dates. Captures policy ID, policy name, clinical category, applicable CPT/HCPCS codes, review criteria source (InterQual, MCG, internal), and version history. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table utilization.bed_day_review {
  bed_day_review_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the bed day review record.']
  concurrent_review_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to utilization.concurrent_review. Business justification: bed_day_review records daily reviews for a concurrent review; child (bed_day_review) gets FK to parent (concurrent_review).']
  coordinator_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the care coordinator assigned to the case.']
  health_plan_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to plan.health_plan. Business justification: Bed Day Review Metrics are reported per health plan to evaluate length‑of‑stay performance.']
  member_identity_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member whose stay is under review.']
  parent_bed_day_review_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on bed_day_review (parent_bed_day_review_id)']
  practice_location_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to provider.provider_provider. Business justification: Links bed‑day review to the responsible provider to support length‑of‑stay variance analysis and readmission risk reporting.']
  provider_network_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to network.provider_network. Business justification: Bed‑day reviews compare LOS against network‑specific benchmarks; network_id is required for accurate network adequacy reporting.']
  record_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to credential.credential_record. Business justification: Bed‑day reviews verify attending provider’s credential status before approving extended stay, satisfying payer and accreditation rules.']
  approval_decision varchar [note: 'Outcome of the review regarding continuation of stay.']
  bed_day_review_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the bed day review.']
  clinical_criteria_met_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the patient met the required clinical criteria for continued stay.']
  clinical_criteria_set varchar [note: 'Name of the clinical criteria set applied during the review (e.g., InterQual, MCG).']
  clinical_criteria_version varchar [note: 'Version of the clinical criteria set used for the assessment.']
  clinical_status varchar [note: 'Clinician-assessed health status of the patient on the review date.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the review record was first created in the system.']
  denial_reason_code varchar [note: 'Standardized code representing the reason for denial, if applicable.']
  denial_reason_description varchar [note: 'Human-readable description of the denial reason.']
  discharge_planning_notes decimal(18,2) [note: 'Narrative notes regarding discharge planning and anticipated needs.']
  extension_days_approved varchar [note: 'Number of additional bed days approved beyond the original length of stay.']
  is_critical boolean [note: 'True if the review is flagged as critical due to clinical urgency.']
  length_of_stay_benchmark_met_flag boolean [note: 'True if the current LOS is within the acceptable benchmark range.']
  length_of_stay_current varchar [note: 'Number of days the patient has been admitted up to the review date.']
  length_of_stay_target varchar [note: 'Targeted length of stay based on clinical criteria and benchmarks.']
  readmission_risk_category varchar [note: 'Risk category derived from the readmission risk score.']
  readmission_risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Calculated risk score indicating probability of readmission within 30 days.']
  regulatory_compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the review complies with applicable regulations (e.g., NCQA, CMS).']
  review_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes entered by the reviewer during the assessment.']
  review_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to each bed day review.']
  review_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the bed day review was performed.']
  reviewer_npi varchar [note: 'NPI of the clinical reviewer who performed the bed day assessment.']
  social_work_involved boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a social worker is engaged in the patient\'s care plan.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the review record.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'VREQ validation marker']

  Note: 'Tracks individual bed day reviews for inpatient concurrent review cases — daily clinical assessments of continued stay medical necessity. Captures review date, reviewer, clinical status, Milliman/InterQual criteria met, extension days approved, and discharge planning notes. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table utilization.um_program_enrollment {
  um_program_enrollment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  group_id varchar [note: 'FK to employer group']
  um_program_id varchar [note: 'FK to UM program']
  contribution_strategy varchar [note: 'Contribution strategy']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record creation timestamp']
  disenrollment_date date [note: 'Disenrollment date']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Effective end date']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Effective start date']
  enrollment_date date [note: 'Enrollment date']
  enrollment_reason varchar [note: 'Reason for enrollment']
  enrollment_status varchar [note: 'Enrollment status']
  is_active boolean [note: 'Whether enrollment is active']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record update timestamp']

  Note: 'This association product represents the enrollment contract between a utilization management program and an employer group. It captures the effective period of the enrollment and the contribution strategy specific to that employer group.. Existence Justification: An employer group can enroll in multiple utilization management (UM) programs, and a single UM program can be applied to many employer groups. The enrollment is actively managed, with start/end dates and contribution strategy captured for each enrollment. This relationship is therefore a true many‑to‑many operational entity. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

  criteria_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the clinical criteria to track updates and revisions.']

  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the record was last updated in the system.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'VREQ validation marker']

Table utilization.episode_of_care {
  episode_of_care_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for episode_of_care']
  health_plan_id varchar [note: 'Identifier for the insurance plan covering the episode of care.']
  identity_id varchar [note: 'System identifier for the patient associated with this episode of care.']
  parent_episode_of_care_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on episode_of_care (parent_episode_of_care_id)']
  practice_location_id varchar [note: 'System identifier for the healthcare provider delivering services in this episode.']
  admission_date date [note: 'Date the patient was admitted to the facility for this episode.']
  claim_approval_date date [note: 'Date the claim was approved by the insurer.']
  claim_denial_reason varchar [note: 'Reason code or description for claim denial, if applicable.']
  claim_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the claim associated with this episode.']
  claim_submission_date date [note: 'Date the claim was submitted to the insurer.']
  classification_or_type varchar [note: 'The type of care episode, indicating the setting and nature of services.']
  created_at timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the episode record was first created in the system.']
  discharge_date decimal(18,2) [note: 'Date the patient was discharged from the facility.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the episode of care becomes effective.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the episode of care ends or is terminated. Nullable for ongoing episodes.']
  episode_number varchar [note: 'External business identifier for the episode of care, used in communications and reporting.']
  length_of_stay_days varchar [note: 'Number of days the patient stayed in the facility during this episode.']
  lifecycle_status varchar [note: 'Current state of the episode of care within its lifecycle.']
  medical_necessity_decision varchar [note: 'Decision on medical necessity for the episode.']
  medical_necessity_decision_date date [note: 'Date the medical necessity decision was made.']
  net_amount_due decimal(15,2) [note: 'Net amount due after applying payments and adjustments.']
  primary_diagnosis_code varchar [note: 'ICD-10 code representing the primary diagnosis for the episode.']
  prior_authorization_decision_date date [note: 'Date the prior authorization decision was made.']
  prior_authorization_request_date date [note: 'Date the prior authorization was requested.']
  prior_authorization_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the prior authorization request.']
  procedure_codes varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of procedure codes (e.g., CPT) performed during the episode.']
  secondary_diagnosis_codes varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of ICD-10 codes for secondary diagnoses.']
  total_adjustments decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total adjustments applied to the charges (e.g., discounts, write-offs).']
  total_charges decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total billed amount for services rendered in this episode.']
  total_payments decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total payments received from insurer and patient for this episode.']
  updated_at timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the episode record.']
  utilization_review_date date [note: 'Date the utilization review was conducted.']
  utilization_review_decision varchar [note: 'Decision outcome of the utilization review.']
  utilization_review_decision_date date [note: 'Date the utilization review decision was finalized.']
  utilization_review_status varchar [note: 'Status of the utilization review process for this episode.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'VREQ validation marker']

  Note: 'Master reference table for episode_of_care. Referenced by episode_of_care_id. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table care.program {
  program_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the care program.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Needed for program budgeting; finance allocates expenses to cost centers per care program for HEDIS reporting and cost analysis.']
  owner_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Required for Program Ownership accountability report linking program_owner to the responsible employee.']
  risk_pool_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to risk.pool. Business justification: Program cost allocation to a specific risk pool is required for risk‑adjustment and financial reporting.']
  vendor_contract_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vendor.vendor_contract. Business justification: Required for Program Contract Management report linking each care program to its governing vendor contract for compliance and cost tracking.']
  accreditation_body varchar [note: 'Organization that provides accreditation for the program.']
  accreditation_status varchar [note: 'Current accreditation state of the program (e.g., NCQA, URAC).']
  clinical_protocol varchar [note: 'Standardized clinical pathway or guideline applied within the program.']
  contact_email varchar [note: 'Primary email address for program inquiries.']
  contact_phone varchar [note: 'Primary phone number for program inquiries.']
  contract_provider_contract_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to contract.provider_contract. Business justification: Contracts specify which provider contracts cover each care program; needed for eligibility, reimbursement, and program performance reporting.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the program record was first created.']
  data_source_system varchar [note: 'Operational system that provides the master program data (e.g., Casenet TruCare).']
  eligibility_criteria varchar [note: 'Business rules that determine member eligibility for enrollment in the program.']
  end_date date [note: 'Date the program is retired or no longer offered (nullable for open‑ended).']
  enrollment_cap varchar [note: 'Maximum number of members allowed to enroll in the program.']
  enrollment_current varchar [note: 'Number of members currently enrolled.']
  enrollment_end_date date [note: 'Date when enrollment closes for the program.']
  enrollment_start_date date [note: 'Date when enrollment opens for the program.']
  evidence_source varchar [note: 'Reference to the clinical study or guideline that validates the program.']
  hcc_included varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of HCC codes that are counted toward the program\'s risk adjustment.']
  hcc_version varchar [note: 'Version of the HCC model used for the program (e.g., 2024).']
  is_evidence_based boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the program is supported by clinical evidence.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date the program was last reviewed for clinical relevance or compliance.']
  line_of_business varchar [note: 'Business line to which the program applies.']
  outcome_actual varchar [note: 'Most recent observed value for the outcome measure.']
  outcome_measure varchar [note: 'Key performance indicator used to evaluate program effectiveness.']
  outcome_target varchar [note: 'Target value or threshold for the outcome measure.']
  program_category varchar [note: 'More granular category within the program type (e.g., diabetes, CHF, COPD).']
  program_code varchar [note: 'Internal code used to reference the program in operational systems.']
  program_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative describing the program\'s purpose, services, and scope.']
  program_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the care program.']
  program_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the program.']
  program_type varchar [note: 'Broad classification of the program offering.']
  review_frequency varchar [note: 'How often the program is scheduled for review.']
  risk_adjustment_factor decimal(5,4) [note: 'Factor used for risk‑adjusted payment calculations (e.g., 0.1234).']
  start_date date [note: 'Date the program becomes effective and available to members.']
  target_population varchar [note: 'Demographic or clinical segment the program is designed for.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the most recent update to the program record.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version identifier for the program definition.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'Validation marker for VREQ preservation requirement']

  Note: 'Master registry of all care management, disease management, and case management programs offered by the health plan — including chronic condition programs (diabetes, CHF, COPD, asthma), complex case management, maternity management, behavioral health programs, and population health initiatives. Tracks program type, eligibility criteria, clinical protocols, accreditation standards (NCQA/URAC), program status, and line-of-business applicability. Source: Casenet TruCare or Altruista program configuration. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table care.care_enrollment {
  care_enrollment_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each care enrollment record.']
  care_member_enrollment_id varchar [note: 'FK establishing single source of truth linkage to canonical member.member_enrollment.member_enrollment_id']
  coordinator_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the care coordinator assigned to the member for this enrollment.']
  group_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to employer.employer_group. Business justification: Required for Employer‑Sponsored Program Enrollment reporting and ACA employer‑level enrollment compliance; employers need to see which members enrolled via their group.']
  member_enrollment_id varchar [note: 'Single-source-of-truth reference to canonical enrollment record.']
  member_risk_score_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to risk.member_risk_score. Business justification: Underwriting uses a member\'s risk score at enrollment; linking provides audit trail for premium determination.']
  member_subscriber_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member enrolled in the care program.']
  program_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the care, disease, or case management program to which the member is enrolled.']
  acuity_level varchar [note: 'Clinical acuity assigned to the member for this program.']
  care_manager_assigned_date date [note: 'Date the care manager was officially assigned to the member.']
  consent_status varchar [note: 'Member\'s consent status for participation and data sharing within the program.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the enrollment record was first created in the system.']
  disenrollment_date date [note: 'Actual date the member left the program.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Planned termination date of the enrollment (null if open‑ended).']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the enrollment becomes effective.']
  enrollment_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to the enrollment, used in operational reporting and member communications.']
  enrollment_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the enrollment request, indicating how the member entered the program.']
  enrollment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the enrollment.']
  enrollment_type varchar [note: 'Category of care program (e.g., disease management).']
  hcc_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Aggregated HCC score associated with the member at enrollment.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes entered by care staff regarding the enrollment.']
  program_tier varchar [note: 'Level of service intensity offered by the program.']
  reason varchar [note: 'Business reason or clinical trigger for enrolling the member.']
  risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Quantitative risk score used for prioritizing outreach (0‑100).']
  status_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation for the current enrollment status (e.g., member request, clinical criteria).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the enrollment record.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'Validation marker for VREQ preservation requirement']

  Note: '[SSOT:enrollment] Reference to canonical SSOT member.member_enrollment for the \'enrollment\' concept; do not duplicate authoritative data here. Tracks member enrollment into specific care management, disease management, or case management programs — capturing enrollment date, disenrollment date, enrollment source (outreach, referral, self-referral, claims-triggered, HRA-triggered), consent status, program tier, enrollment status, and acuity level. Represents the active participation record linking a member to a care program. Coordinator assignment details are maintained on the care_coordinator product. Distinct from health plan enrollment (owned by the enrollment domain). Source: Casenet TruCare or Altruista. SSOT NOTE: Canonical source of truth for the \'enrollment\' concept is member.member_enrollment; this product is retained as a domain-specific view/duplicate and must defer to the canonical entity. [FHIR-aligned] SSOT duplicate; single source of truth is member.member_enrollment.'
}

Table care.care_plan {
  care_plan_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the care plan record.']
  coordinator_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the care coordinator assigned to manage the plan.']
  pharmacy_vendor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vendor.vendor. Business justification: Needed for Pharmacy Benefit Management integration; care plan references the pharmacy vendor responsible for medication fulfillment, used in cost and quality reporting.']
  practice_location_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to provider.provider_provider. Business justification: Care plans must be overseen by a designated primary care provider to ensure care coordination and meet NCQA quality measures.']
  primary_care_member_subscriber_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member for whom the care plan is created.']
  program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to care.program. Business justification: Plan belongs to a program; adding program_id FK establishes parent-child relationship and enables join to program attributes.']
  barriers_to_care varchar [note: 'Identified obstacles that may impede goal achievement (e.g., transportation, language).']
  care_plan_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the care plan.']
  creation_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the care plan record was first created in the system.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when the care plan expires or is terminated; null if open‑ended.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the care plan becomes effective for the member.']
  fhir_activity varchar [note: 'FHIR CarePlan.activity mapping']
  fhir_goal varchar [note: 'FHIR CarePlan.goal mapping']
  fhir_intent varchar [note: 'FHIR CarePlan.intent mapping']
  fhir_status varchar [note: 'FHIR CarePlan.status mapping']
  fhir_subject varchar [note: 'FHIR CarePlan.subject mapping']
  high_risk_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the member meets high‑risk criteria for intensive management.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the care plan.']
  plan_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the care plan, e.g., "Diabetes Management Plan".']
  plan_number varchar [note: 'External business identifier assigned to the care plan, used in member communications and reporting.']
  plan_type varchar [note: 'Category of the care plan indicating its primary focus area.']
  privacy_consent_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the member has consented to share health information for care planning.']
  progress_notes varchar [note: 'Free‑text notes documenting progress toward the goal.']
  risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Composite risk score (e.g., HCC/RAF) used to prioritize care management resources.']
  version varchar [note: 'Incremental version number tracking revisions to the care plan.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'Validation marker for VREQ preservation requirement']

  Note: 'Individualized care plan created for a member enrolled in a care or case management program — documenting clinical and behavioral goals (goal description, category, target value, target date, status: active/achieved/abandoned, progress notes), interventions, barriers to care, target dates, care coordinator assignments, plan status, and clinical/progress notes. Goals are modeled as embedded detail records within the care plan with independent status tracking, enabling multi-dimensional progress measurement across clinical, behavioral, and SDOH goal categories. Single source of truth for all care plan goal lifecycle management. Supports longitudinal tracking of member health outcomes. Aligns with NCQA care management standards and CMS chronic care management (CCM) requirements. Source: Casenet TruCare or Altruista. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'Validation marker for VREQ preservation requirement']

  Note: 'Individual clinical or behavioral goals defined within a member care plan — including goal description, goal category (clinical, behavioral, social determinants), target value, target date, goal status (active, achieved, abandoned), and progress notes. Each goal has its own lifecycle independent of the parent care plan, enabling granular tracking of member progress across multiple care dimensions. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table care.gap {
  gap_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the care gap record.']
  assigned_care_coordinator_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the care coordinator assigned to address the gap.']
  claim_header_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the claim that contributed to closing the gap.']
  health_plan_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to plan.health_plan. Business justification: Required for HEDIS gap analysis reports that aggregate gaps by health plan, a regulatory reporting need.']
  member_risk_score_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to risk.member_risk_score. Business justification: Care gap prioritization incorporates the member\'s risk score; FK ties gap records to the underlying risk score.']
  member_subscriber_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member associated with the care gap.']
  provider_network_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to network.provider_network. Business justification: Network‑adequacy reports require linking each care gap to the provider network of the member\'s primary provider to assess coverage gaps.']
  resolution_vendor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vendor.vendor. Business justification: Closing care gaps may be assigned to specific vendors (e.g., labs); linking provides accountability and compliance reporting.']
  actual_resolution_date date [note: 'Date when the care gap was actually resolved.']
  clinical_category varchar [note: 'Clinical domain or condition associated with the gap (e.g., diabetes, cardiovascular).']
  close_date date [note: 'Date when the care gap was resolved or closed (nullable if still open).']
  closure_method varchar [note: 'Method by which the care gap was closed.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the care gap record was created in the lakehouse.']
  documentation_status varchar [note: 'Status of required documentation for the care gap.']
  gap_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the identified care gap.']
  gap_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the care gap.']
  gap_type varchar [note: 'Category of the care gap (e.g., preventive service, chronic condition management).']
  hedis_measure_code varchar [note: 'Standard HEDIS measure code linked to the care gap.']
  is_critical boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the gap is considered critical for member health.']
  measure_target_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'Expected target value for the measure (e.g., HbA1c <7%).']
  open_date date [note: 'Date when the care gap was first identified.']
  priority_level varchar [note: 'Business-assigned priority for addressing the care gap.']
  risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Quantitative risk score associated with the gap (e.g., based on HCC/RAF).']
  target_date date [note: 'Desired date by which the care gap should be closed.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the care gap record.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'Validation marker for VREQ preservation requirement']

  Note: 'Registry of identified care gaps for members — preventive services, chronic condition management measures, and HEDIS-aligned quality measures that have not been completed (e.g., HbA1c testing, mammography, colorectal cancer screening, medication adherence). Tracks gap type, HEDIS measure code, gap open date, gap close date, closure method (claim, supplemental data, attestation), and gap status. Core to HEDIS performance and Star Ratings improvement programs. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table care.coordinator {
  coordinator_id varchar [pk, note: 'Surrogate primary key uniquely identifying each care coordinator record.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the coordinator\'s direct supervisor (another care coordinator).']
  external_vendor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vendor.vendor. Business justification: Some care coordinators are external vendor staff; linking tracks vendor‑provided coordination services for staffing and cost analysis.']
  record_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to credential.credential_record. Business justification: Credentialing staff for care coordination requires linking each coordinator to their credential record for compliance reporting and audit of licensing/sanctions.']
  assigned_lob varchar [note: 'Business line for which the coordinator primarily provides services.']
  caseload_capacity varchar [note: 'Maximum number of members the coordinator can actively manage.']
  caseload_weight decimal(5,2) [note: 'Weighted factor reflecting case complexity for workload balancing.']
  certification_codes varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of professional certifications (e.g., CCM, ACM, CPH).']
  coordinator_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the coordinator record.']
  current_caseload_count varchar [note: 'Number of members currently assigned to the coordinator.']
  email_address varchar [note: 'Primary email address used for secure communications with the coordinator.']
  employment_status varchar [note: 'Current employment state of the coordinator.']
  first_name varchar [note: 'Given name of the care coordinator.']
  full_name varchar [note: 'Legal full name of the care coordinator as used in member communications and credentialing.']
  hire_date date [note: 'Date the coordinator was hired by the organization.']
  last_name varchar [note: 'Family name of the care coordinator.']
  last_training_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent mandatory training completed by the coordinator.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes entered by supervisors or administrators about the coordinator.']
  organization_unit varchar [note: 'Department or unit within the health plan where the coordinator is assigned.']
  phone_number varchar [note: 'Primary telephone number for reaching the coordinator.']
  primary_contact_method varchar [note: 'Preferred channel for contacting the coordinator.']
  record_audit_created timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the coordinator record was first created in the system.']
  record_audit_updated timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the coordinator record.']
  role_type varchar [note: 'Functional role of the coordinator within the care management domain.']
  specialty_area varchar [note: 'Clinical specialty or disease focus of the coordinator.']
  termination_date date [note: 'Date the coordinator\'s employment ended, if applicable.']
  training_certifications varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of completed training programs (e.g., HEDIS, STAR).']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'Validation marker for VREQ preservation requirement']

  Note: 'Master record for care coordinators, case managers, disease management nurses, and health coaches — capturing demographics, credentials (RN, LCSW, CHW), certifications (CCM, ACM), caseload capacity, specialty focus areas, assigned LOB, active status, and supervisor hierarchy. Single source of truth for coordinator-to-member assignment history including assignment date, assignment type (primary, backup, specialist), assignment reason, caseload weight, assignment status, reassignment/handoff tracking, and continuity-of-care documentation. Enables caseload management, workload balancing, continuity-of-care reporting, and coordinator performance analytics. Source: Casenet TruCare or Altruista workforce configuration. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table care.member_outreach {
  member_outreach_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for each outreach activity record.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the person or system that executed the outreach.']
  member_identity_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member who was contacted.']
  outreach_vendor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vendor.vendor. Business justification: Outreach activities are often outsourced to call‑center vendors; linking enables performance metrics and regulatory reporting of member contact.']
  channel varchar [note: 'Communication channel through which the outreach was performed.']
  compliance_consent_obtained boolean [note: 'True when required consent for contacting the member was documented.']
  consent_obtained_date date [note: 'Date on which the member gave consent for outreach communications.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the outreach record was first created in the lakehouse.']
  follow_up_due_date date [note: 'Target date for completing any required follow‑up.']
  follow_up_required boolean [note: 'True when additional contact or action is needed after the outreach.']
  is_automated boolean [note: 'True if the outreach was generated by an automated workflow; false if manual.']
  language_preference varchar [note: 'Preferred language of the member for outreach communications.']
  member_outreach_status varchar [note: 'Lifecycle state of the outreach activity record.']
  outcome varchar [note: 'Observed outcome of the outreach interaction.']
  outcome_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the outcome of the outreach was logged.']
  outreach_duration_seconds varchar [note: 'Length of the phone call or interaction measured in seconds.']
  outreach_notes varchar [note: 'Additional comments or details recorded about the outreach.']
  outreach_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the outreach attempt occurred.']
  purpose varchar [note: 'Reason for contacting the member, such as enrolling in a program or closing a care gap.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the most recent modification to the outreach record.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'Validation marker for VREQ preservation requirement']

  Note: 'Records of outreach activities conducted by care coordinators or automated systems to engage high-risk members in care management programs — including outreach date, outreach channel (phone, mail, SMS, portal), outreach purpose (program enrollment, care gap closure, HRA completion, medication adherence), outcome (reached, left voicemail, refused, enrolled), and follow-up requirements. Supports population health engagement tracking and HEDIS outreach documentation. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table care.hra {
  hra_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for each health risk assessment record.']
  assessment_vendor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vendor.vendor. Business justification: Health risk assessments are conducted by third‑party vendors; linking supports audit of assessment source and compliance.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the staff member or system that performed the assessment.']
  member_identity_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member who completed the assessment.']
  questionnaire_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the questionnaire definition used.']
  answered_questions varchar [note: 'Number of questions answered by the member.']
  assessment_date date [note: 'Date when the health risk assessment was performed.']
  assessment_status varchar [note: 'Current processing status of the assessment record.']
  assessment_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the record is a Health Risk Assessment or a Social Determinants of Health screening.']
  assessment_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the assessment questionnaire used.']
  community_resource_referrals varchar [note: 'List of community resources referred to the member based on assessment findings.']
  completion_channel varchar [note: 'Channel through which the member completed the assessment.']
  compliance_cms_required boolean [note: 'Indicates if the assessment is required for CMS reporting.']
  compliance_ncqa_required boolean [note: 'Indicates if the assessment satisfies NCQA SDOH standards.']
  identified_health_risks varchar [note: 'Free‑text list of clinical health risks identified in the assessment.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes captured by the assessor.']
  questionnaire_version varchar [note: 'Version string of the questionnaire definition.']
  recommended_programs varchar [note: 'Care programs or interventions recommended for the member.']
  record_audit_created timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the assessment record was first created in the data warehouse.']
  record_audit_updated timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the assessment record.']
  risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numerical risk score calculated from the assessment responses.']
  risk_score_percentile decimal(5,2) [note: 'Member\'s risk score percentile compared to the plan population.']
  risk_tier varchar [note: 'Risk tier derived from the risk score.']
  screening_tool varchar [note: 'Name of the questionnaire or tool used for the assessment.']
  sdoh_education boolean [note: 'Indicates if the member reported education-related barriers.']
  sdoh_financial_strain boolean [note: 'Indicates if the member reported financial strain.']
  sdoh_food_insecurity boolean [note: 'Indicates if the member reported food insecurity.']
  sdoh_housing_instability boolean [note: 'Indicates if the member reported housing instability.']
  sdoh_social_isolation boolean [note: 'Indicates if the member reported social isolation.']
  sdoh_transportation boolean [note: 'Indicates if the member reported transportation barriers.']
  total_questions varchar [note: 'Total number of questions in the questionnaire.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'Validation marker for VREQ preservation requirement']

  Note: 'Health Risk Assessment (HRA) and Social Determinants of Health (SDOH) screening records completed by members — capturing assessment date, assessment type (HRA, SDOH screening), assessment version, screening tool (plan-specific HRA, AHC HRSN, PRAPARE, Hunger Vital Sign), completion channel (portal, phone, mail), risk score, risk tier (low, moderate, high, very high), identified health risks, SDOH domain flags (food insecurity, housing instability, transportation, social isolation, financial strain, education), community resource referrals, recommended programs, and assessment status. Includes the versioned questionnaire catalog (question text, category, response type, scoring weight) and individual member responses with clinical flag triggers. Single source of truth for all member health risk and SDOH assessments. HRAs are a CMS-required data element for Medicare Advantage plans and drive care program enrollment and risk stratification. SDOH screenings support CMS health equity requirements and NCQA SDOH standards. Source: Casenet TruCare or Altruista. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table care.condition_registry {
  condition_registry_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each condition registry record.']
  care_plan_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the care plan linked to this condition, if any.']
  member_identity_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member to whom the condition applies.']
  active_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the condition is currently active for the member.']
  condition_category varchar [note: 'Business classification of the condition (e.g., HCC‑mapped, HEDIS chronic, behavioral health).']
  condition_code varchar [note: 'Standard ICD-10 diagnosis code representing the clinical condition.']
  condition_description varchar [note: 'Human‑readable description of the condition.']
  confirmation_status varchar [note: 'Current confirmation state of the condition record.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the condition record was first created.']
  data_quality_status varchar [note: 'Current data quality assessment of the condition record.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date the condition ceased to be effective (null if still active).']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date the condition became effective for care program eligibility.']
  fhir_clinical_status varchar [note: 'FHIR Condition.clinicalStatus mapping']
  fhir_code varchar [note: 'FHIR Condition.code mapping']
  fhir_subject varchar [note: 'FHIR Condition.subject mapping']
  hcc_code varchar [note: 'HCC code derived from the condition for risk adjustment scoring.']
  identification_date date [note: 'Date the condition was first identified for the member.']
  identification_method varchar [note: 'Method used to identify the condition for the member.']
  is_chronic boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether the condition is considered chronic for HEDIS and risk adjustment.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date the condition record was last reviewed for accuracy.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑text clinical notes or comments about the condition.']
  onset_date date [note: 'Date when the condition first manifested.']
  population_segment varchar [note: 'Segment of the member population based on the condition\'s risk level.']
  raf_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Calculated RAF score associated with the condition.']
  resolution_date date [note: 'Date when the condition was resolved or considered inactive.']
  risk_adjustment_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates if the condition contributes to risk‑adjusted payments.']
  severity varchar [note: 'Clinical severity level of the condition.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the condition record.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'Validation marker for VREQ preservation requirement']

  Note: 'Chronic condition registry identifying members with specific diagnosed conditions — including ICD-10 condition code, condition category (HCC-mapped, HEDIS chronic condition, behavioral health), identification method (claims-based, EHR, provider attestation, HRA), identification date, confirmation status, and active/inactive flag. Serves as the authoritative clinical condition roster within the care domain for care program targeting, population health stratification, and HEDIS measure eligibility determination. References the risk domain for authoritative HCC/RAF scoring. Source: Casenet TruCare or Altruista clinical data. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table care.hedis_measure {
  hedis_measure_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the HEDIS measure. [_canonical_skip_reason: REFERENCE_LOOKUP - catalog of HEDIS quality measures]']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the measure record was first created in the data lake.']
  data_collection_methodology varchar [note: 'Method used to collect data for the measure (administrative, hybrid, or survey).']
  denominator_definition varchar [note: 'Exact definition of the denominator component of the measure.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the measure became effective for reporting.']
  eligible_population_criteria varchar [note: 'Eligibility rules that define the member cohort for the measure.']
  exclusion_criteria varchar [note: 'Conditions or member attributes that exclude a member from the denominator.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the measure record.']
  measure_code varchar [note: 'Official NCQA code that uniquely identifies the measure.']
  measure_denominator_logic varchar [note: 'Detailed logical expression or algorithm used to compute the denominator.']
  measure_description varchar [note: 'Full textual description of what the measure evaluates.']
  measure_domain varchar [note: 'High‑level domain of the measure (e.g., effectiveness of care, access/availability, utilization).']
  measure_exclusion_logic varchar [note: 'Detailed logical expression defining exclusions from the denominator.']
  measure_last_reviewed_date date [note: 'Date when the measure definition was last reviewed for accuracy.']
  measure_last_updated_by varchar [note: 'User or system that performed the most recent update.']
  measure_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the HEDIS quality measure.']
  measure_national_benchmark decimal(5,2) [note: 'National average performance for the measure (percentage).']
  measure_notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes or comments about the measure.']
  measure_numerator_logic varchar [note: 'Detailed logical expression or algorithm used to compute the numerator.']
  measure_owner varchar [note: 'Business unit or team responsible for the measure.']
  measure_related_hcc varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of Hierarchical Condition Category (HCC) codes relevant to the measure.']
  measure_related_raf decimal(18,6) [note: 'Comma‑separated list of Risk Adjustment Factor (RAF) variables linked to the measure.']
  measure_reporting_frequency varchar [note: 'How often the measure is reported (annual, semi‑annual, quarterly).']
  measure_scoring_method varchar [note: 'Method used to calculate the final score (e.g., rate, percentage, binary).']
  measure_star_rating_impact varchar [note: 'Explanation of how the measure influences Medicare Star Ratings.']
  measure_state_benchmark decimal(5,2) [note: 'State‑level average performance for the measure (percentage).']
  measure_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the measure.']
  measure_target_value decimal(10,2) [note: 'Target performance value or threshold for the measure.']
  measure_url varchar [note: 'Link to the official documentation or specification for the measure.']
  measurement_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year for which the measure is defined.']
  numerator_definition varchar [note: 'Exact definition of the numerator component of the measure.']
  retirement_date date [note: 'Date when the measure was retired or superseded (null if still active).']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version of the measure definition, incremented on each change.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'Validation marker for VREQ preservation requirement']

  Note: 'Reference catalog of HEDIS (Healthcare Effectiveness Data and Information Set) quality measures maintained by NCQA — including measure ID, measure name, measure domain (effectiveness of care, access/availability, utilization), measurement year, eligible population criteria, numerator definition, denominator definition, exclusion criteria, and data collection methodology (administrative, hybrid, survey). Authoritative reference for HEDIS performance tracking and Star Ratings. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

Table care.hedis_result {
  hedis_result_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each HEDIS result record.']
  health_plan_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the health plan under which the member is enrolled.']
  hedis_measure_id varchar [note: 'Standard code for the HEDIS quality measure (e.g., HM-001).']
  member_identity_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the member to whom the HEDIS result applies.']
  practice_location_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the provider associated with the source claim or service.']
  audit_created timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the HEDIS result record was first created in the lakehouse.']
  audit_updated timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the HEDIS result record.']
  collection_method varchar [note: 'Methodology used to collect the underlying data for the measure.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Overall compliance outcome for the member on this measure.']
  data_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the data used to determine the HEDIS result.']
  denominator_criteria_met boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the member satisfied the denominator condition (typically eligibility).']
  eligibility_criteria varchar [note: 'Logical definition of the member population eligible for the measure.']
  exclusion_criteria varchar [note: 'Specific criteria that triggered the member\'s exclusion.']
  exclusion_reason varchar [note: 'Reason or code describing why the member was excluded.']
  is_excluded boolean [note: 'True if the member is excluded from the measure based on exclusion criteria.']
  measure_category varchar [note: 'Category grouping of the measure (e.g., preventive, chronic).']
  measure_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric score assigned to the member for the measure (if applicable).']
  measure_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the measure as process, outcome, or structure.']
  measure_version varchar [note: 'Version or edition of the measure as published by NCQA.']
  measurement_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year for which the HEDIS measurement is reported.']
  numerator_criteria_met boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the member satisfied the numerator condition for the measure.']
  result_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the HEDIS result was calculated.']
  source_record_reference varchar [note: 'Identifier of the underlying source record (e.g., claim ID, lab result ID).']
  source_record_type varchar [note: 'Type of the source record that supplied data for the result.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'Validation marker for VREQ preservation requirement']

  Note: 'Single source of truth for HEDIS (Healthcare Effectiveness Data and Information Set) quality measure definitions and member-level compliance results. Contains the authoritative NCQA-published measure catalog (measure ID, name, domain: effectiveness of care/access/availability/utilization, measurement year, eligible population criteria, numerator/denominator definitions, exclusion criteria, data collection methodology: administrative/hybrid/survey) and member-level results indicating whether each member met numerator criteria for a given measurement year. Tracks data source (claim, lab, supplemental, medical record), compliance status (compliant, non-compliant, excluded), and hybrid audit trail. Aggregated to produce plan-level HEDIS rates submitted to NCQA for Star Ratings, accreditation, and quality bonus payments. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

  Note: 'CAHPS (Consumer Assessment of Healthcare Providers and Systems) survey administration and response records — capturing survey type (Health Plan CAHPS, Medicare CAHPS, PCMH CAHPS), survey year, administration method (mail, phone, mixed), member sampling frame, survey vendor, response status, overall satisfaction score, and individual member responses by question with composite score contribution flags. CAHPS results feed directly into CMS Star Ratings and NCQA accreditation. Enables drill-down analysis of member experience drivers across CAHPS domains (getting needed care, getting care quickly, doctor communication, customer service). Source: Survey vendor data. [FHIR-aligned]'

Used to assign members to appropriate care management interventions and prioritize outreach resources. Source: Casenet TruCare or Altruista population health module. [FHIR-aligned]'

  pmpm_cost_band decimal(18,2) [note: 'Per‑Member‑Per‑Month cost band associated with the tier.']
  recommended_care_program varchar [note: 'Name or code of the care program recommended for members in this tier.']
  risk_factor_weight decimal(5,2) [note: 'Weight applied to the risk factor in the predictive model.']
  risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric risk score associated with the tier (higher indicates greater risk).']
  risk_score_source double [note: 'Origin of the risk score used for the assignment.']
  segment_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the segment criteria.']
  segment_name varchar [note: 'Name of the population segment definition linked to this tier.']

  tier_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the risk tier (e.g., "High Risk").']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the tier record.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version of the tier definition for change tracking.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'Validation marker for VREQ preservation requirement']

  Note: 'Member-level risk tier assignment and population health stratification — containing population segment definitions (segment name, stratification model: predictive risk model/HCC-based/claims-based, risk tier bands: low/rising risk/high/catastrophic, inclusion criteria, recommended care program, PMPM cost band, effective date) and member-specific tier assignments (risk score, assignment date, assignment method: automated model/manual override/clinical review, next reassessment date). Single source of truth for both population segment configuration and member-level risk tier history. Tracks risk tier changes over time to support longitudinal population health management and care program targeting. Distinct from CMS RAF scores (owned by the risk domain) — this covers all LOBs and internal stratification models. Source: Casenet TruCare or Altruista population health module. [FHIR-aligned]'
}

  readmission_within_30_days boolean [note: 'Flag indicating if the member was readmitted within 30 days of discharge.']
  record_audit_created timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the SNF stay record was first created in the system.']

  risk_adjustment_factor decimal(5,2) [note: 'Factor applied for risk‑adjusted payment calculations.']

  transition_of_care_plan varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the transition‑of‑care plan for the member after discharge.']
  vreq_validated boolean [note: 'Validation marker for VREQ preservation requirement']

  Note: 'Skilled Nursing Facility (SNF) post-acute stay records managed by the care management team — capturing admission date, discharge date, SNF facility NPI, admission diagnosis, care coordinator assigned, concurrent review schedule, discharge planning status, readmission risk flag, and transition-of-care plan. Care management owns SNF coordination distinct from utilization management which owns the PA authorization. Supports CMS SNF quality reporting and readmission reduction programs. [FHIR-aligned]'
}
